programme.desc: Brick gets anything but good luck after he finds an evil four-leaf clover; Frankie makes a decision to find a caregiver for Aunt Edie after she almost burns down her house; Axl tries to devise a plan that will keep his status as a lady's man in play.

programme.title: The Middle: The Telling
programme.desc: It seems like Frankie truly has eyes in the back of her head when she busts both Sue and Axl for making bad choices that they thought no one would ever know about, but it turns out that Brick is her snitch.

programme.title: The Middle: The Wedding
programme.desc: Frankie and Mike are surprised to receive an invitation to Mike's brother's fast-approaching wedding, but their surprise turns to panic when they learn that he has listed their home as the site of the ceremony.

programme.title: Reba: All Growed Up
programme.desc: Reba learns to let her children make their own decisions when Van decides to quit school.

programme.title: Reba: The United Front
programme.desc: Reba is thrilled when Kyra asks her for advice on boys, but she later regrets giving it.

programme.title: Reba: To Tell You the Truth
programme.desc: Cheyenne suspects Van of cheating on her and kicks him out of the house.

programme.title: Reba: Brock's Mulligan
programme.desc: Brock tells Barbara Jean and Reba of his plans to become a professional golfer.

programme.title: Reba: The Shirt Off My Back
programme.desc: Van shaves his head for the team; Barbara Jean and Reba go into business together.

programme.title: Reba: Sister Act
programme.desc: Kyra punches a classmate who insulted her sister; Van helps Jake with his science project.

programme.title: Movie: All for Love
programme.desc: A romance novelist worries she's lost her touch after a string of unsuccessful events. She sets her new book around a Navy Seal hero and dives into research with a retired Seal who teaches her skills she didn't know she had.

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow
programme.desc: When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.

programme.title: South Park: Fatbeard
programme.desc: Cartman's dream of living the life of a pirate will come true if he can just get to Somalia. When he doesn't find a crew of swashbucklers, he assumes command and leads the Somalian pirates to a glory of riches.

programme.title: South Park: Franchise Prequel
programme.desc: Facebook is the ultimate weapon for Professor Chaos.

programme.title: South Park: Coon 2: Hindsight
programme.desc: 'Coon and Friends' set out to help the victims of BP's latest catastrophic drilling accident in the Gulf. Much to the Coon's dismay, another Super Hero gets there first.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion Rises
programme.desc: Mysterion's true identity is revealed. Meanwhile, the Coon, scorned by his fellow Super Heroes, turns to the demon god Cthulhu to help him get his revenge on friends and the rest of mankind.

programme.title: South Park: Coon vs. Coon and Friends
programme.desc: Coon and Friends find themselves at the mercy of Cartman who now has the dark lord, Cthulhu, doing his bidding. Kenny wrestles with the curse of his super power through his alter ego, Mysterion.

programme.title: South Park: The Entity
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device. Meanwhile, Kyle tries to ditch his cousin, also named Kyle, who comes to South Park for an extended visit.

programme.title: South Park: The Coon
programme.desc: 'The Coon' rises from the trash and takes his place as a lone vigilante who wipes out crime in the town of South Park. When another superhero encroaches on his territory, The Coon seeks out some unlikely allies.

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos
programme.desc: When the boys fire Butters as their new friend, devastation over his rejection unleashes his dark side and the super villain Professor Chaos is born.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Brian Posehn, Kevin Nealon, Quinta Brunson
programme.desc: The Q-Tip King asks skate store employees if they want in on his scheme, a retirement home tries to complete an old man’s bucket list, and the first female jet skier prepares for her debut.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: June 9, 2021
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: South Park: Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: After Sexual Harassment Panda 'educates' the children, Cartman sues Stan for sexual harassment, and a flurry of other lawsuits follow.

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings
programme.desc: The boys of South Park produce their own morning news show on the school's closed-circuit television station and are immediately caught up in an intense competition for ratings.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Brian Posehn, Kevin Nealon, Quinta Brunson
programme.desc: The Q-Tip King asks skate store employees if they want in on his scheme, a retirement home tries to complete an old man’s bucket list, and the first female jet skier prepares for her debut.

programme.title: South Park: You Got F'd in the A
programme.desc: Stan just got served, and now it's up to him to put together a team of South Park's best dancers to compete against a troupe from Orange County.

programme.title: South Park: Mystery of the Urinal Deuce
programme.desc: Cartman exposes the true culprit behind the September 11th attacks, uncovering the world's largest conspiracy of all time. Kyle and Stan hit the road in search of the truth and come face-to-face with the masterminds who pulled off the operation.

programme.title: South Park: Dances With Smurfs

programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Daniels Family: Episode 3
programme.desc: Homes and lives of veterans across the country are transformed by a team of experts.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Must Have Lost It on the Wind
programme.desc: With Cristina gone, a new doctor, Maggie Pierce, making the rounds and Derek wanting to move to Washington DC, Meredith struggles to regain a sense of normalcy both at home and in the hospital.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Puzzle With a Piece Missing
programme.desc: In this Maggie centric episode, she continues to try to make a positive impression at the hospital but finds herself in extremely unfortunate situations. Meanwhile, Richard continues to hold onto his secret.

programme.title: The Closer: The Butler Did It
programme.desc: The crew investigates when a wealthy woman dies months after she marries a young stripper and her butler commits suicide.

programme.title: The Closer: L.A. Woman
programme.desc: A businesswoman is gunned down in Hollywood; Brenda locks horns with the FBI while investigating the murder of an Iranian businessman.

programme.title: Major Crimes: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Provenza faces possible permanent desk duty while the squad investigates the suspicious death of a loathsome ICE agent, which brings them into contact with the residents of an ancient apartment complex nicknamed La Shangri-la.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Backfire
programme.desc: A 19-year-old prostitute is brutally murdered. The squad rushes to reach a deal with the remorseless killer they believe is part of a larger criminal enterprise. Their efforts, however, do not sit well with the judge assigned to the case.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Poster Boy
programme.desc: The team works strategically to capture a spree killer who has put everyone on high alert. Trying to solve the case quickly, Raydor is torn between two seemingly right decisions, each of which comes with major consequences.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: After a bad batch of drugs claims the lives of two brothers, the race is on for the squad to find the dealer before more of their fellow high school students are threatened. Meanwhile, Rusty is feeling smothered by his new security detail.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Jailbait
programme.desc: When a newly released prisoner misses two back-to-back parole meetings, the squad is called in to track him down. Meanwhile, Sharon invites a therapist to the office to evaluate Rusty over a game of chess.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Bloodshed in the Barn
programme.desc: Not long after taking a new job, beloved horse-trainer Fiona Southwell is found brutally murdered in a rural stable, and a small seaside town in Northern England must find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Firestarter: A Wall of Flames Part 1
programme.desc: A string of horrifying fires plagues California in the Eighties and Nineties, one of them fatally trapping four people inside. Are these raging infernos accidental or is someone setting them deliberately?

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Firestarter: Chasing a Pyromaniac Part 2
programme.desc: In a race against time, investigators hunt for an arsonist setting devastating fires across California. To their complete shock, the man responsible turns out to be none other than renowned fire investigator Captain John Orr.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Torture House
programme.desc: Two brothers share a grotesque hobby of kidnapping and torturing prostitutes, until one of their victims escapes and leads police to their house of horrors.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Love, Money and Death
programme.desc: After popular American University accounting professor Sue Ann Marcum is killed, police suspect one-time stock broker and Juarez, Mexico native Jorge Rueda Landeros is responsible.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sisters in Death
programme.desc: After his high-school aged daughters disobey him by dating, a strict father allegedly kills them.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Point Blank Murder
programme.desc: A man is found dead on his living room floor, three decades later his case remains open. A detective is determined to pin the crime on the man's roommate.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Brutal Obsession
programme.desc: A rejected abusive boyfriend stalks his ex and mother of his child, trapping and killing her at her workplace. A 61 year-old grandmother is raped by a 37 year-old after being lured into his dungeon-like home.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sex Slaves in Texas
programme.desc: Alfonso Diaz-Juarez is accused of kidnapping young women from Mexico and forcing them into prostitution in Houston cantinas.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Norse Power
programme.desc: Josh Gates journeys from Denmark to the remote island of Iceland during his investigation of how a group of Norse tribesmen gained power in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Viking Explorers
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates whether the Vikings landed in the United States more than 500 years before any other Europeans. To settle the claim, he traces their westward expansion from Iceland to Greenland and into what would become the United States.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Hitler's Fate
programme.desc: Josh Gates uncovers secret Nazi hideouts in Argentina and investigates what may be the most shocking conspiracy theory of all: Adolf Hitler's true' fate.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Back to the Future Part 1
programme.desc: Josh Gates and Christopher Lloyd set off on an unprecedented adventure : traveling across the country from Tinseltown to Texas and Massachusetts to hunt down the original DeLorean Time Machine from Back to the Future and give it to Michael J. Fox.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Secret Solved
programme.desc: Breaking news forces Josh to race across the globe. One of the wickedly hard puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh has been chasing for years, might have been solved. He's been crisscrossing the US to track it down, but this solve is in Josh's hometown.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Back to the Future Part 1
programme.desc: Josh Gates and Christopher Lloyd set off on an unprecedented adventure : traveling across the country from Tinseltown to Texas and Massachusetts to hunt down the original DeLorean Time Machine from Back to the Future and give it to Michael J. Fox.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Secret Solved
programme.desc: Breaking news forces Josh to race across the globe. One of the wickedly hard puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh has been chasing for years, might have been solved. He's been crisscrossing the US to track it down, but this solve is in Josh's hometown.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Max Hits
programme.desc: Drew scores a huge farmhouse table from a wholesaler in Exeter, then heads to North London to visit one of his best-kept secrets before taking off for Herefordshire to a busy antiques center where he spies an early Victorian whatnot.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Tour de France
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard and John Tee search for antique chic in France.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: British Gems
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard checks out factories in the Midlands.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Rural Treasures
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard checks out hand-made soap factory and a rural manor house with antiques for sale.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Furniture of the 20th Century
programme.desc: Drew checks out 20th-Century designer furniture, a town's last brass foundry, and the country's largest collection of Asian antiques.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: When Cows Attack
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead threatened by heat, coyotes and even cows. Yes, cows. Disaster strikes when Marty attempts to protect livestock with a massive build, and the race is on to finish the project before father Paul must leave for work.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Ozark Mountain Misery
programme.desc: The Raney family goes to the Ozarks, where Marty spent his childhood homesteading, and discovers a malnourished couple and a mouldy cabin that's making them sick. Massive electric storms hit, but the homestead must be built before Mother Nature wins.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wisconsin Washout
programme.desc: Marty takes on a huge diverter trench to deflect torrents of storm water from devasting the homestead of musician Lou and his girlfriend Stacy. But a storm is the forecast, so no one can predict if this rescue will succeed.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wolves at the Door
programme.desc: Poisoned well water and a mystery predator plague an Arizona homestead. After the family dog is killed, the Raney's must act quick to stop the couple from becoming the next victims.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Grizzly Bait
programme.desc: Arctic temperatures and a hungry grizzly wreak havoc on a struggling homestead. The Raneys leap to action with huge builds including a blacksmith shop, but tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: High Country Bear Lair
programme.desc: The Raneys build an old style root cellar and an innovative greenhouse and attempt to inspire two off-grid reluctant teenage sisters to help bring their father's dream to life.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Poisoned
programme.desc: The Raneys build the Rains a hillside garden, turn a cave into a goat fortress, and find uncontaminated water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: With the first winter storm just days away, the Raney clan rushes to seal in Misty's cabin as Matt embarks on a last-minute hunt. But tragedy strikes and a devastating cabin fire threatens to derail the Raneys' homestead dream.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Leave It to Nevus
programme.desc: With pandemic safety protocols in place, Dr. Lee reopens her office. Monica has a large birthmark growing on the side of her face. Jackie has a melon-sized lump on the back of her shoulder. Reginald has large, rare growths on the back of his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Romancing the Lump
programme.desc: Heather has a huge growth on her leg and fears removing it could leave a keloid. Jesse and Nelda are siblings with matching and painful skin conditions. Margarita has a cluster of unsightly bumps behind her ear, and Paul has a giant hump on his back.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: Tumor Takeover
programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body. Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck. Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen. Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Lipoma Whisperer
programme.desc: Melissa has spent years trying to cover a huge lipoma with a sweatshirt. Tyler's cancer fears have prevented him from having his huge head lumps examined. Tahj is plagued by painful boils. Amber has ear keloids that can no longer be ignored.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Winners Take All
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe think old flames are brewing between Kourtney and Scott and take it upon themselves to set them up on a romantic date. The Kardashian girls challenge the Jenners to an obstacle course. Kris and Corey agree to abstain from sex.

programme.title: The Daily Pop

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Great Ex-pectations

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Summer of Love
programme.desc: Scott finally admits he's still in love with Kourtney. Khloè sets out in search of a homeless man who made a lasting impact on her years ago. Kim enlists the help of a professional to make her TikTok dancing debut.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End of an Era
programme.desc: The family makes a big decision about the future of the show and reflects on how Keeping Up will truly be an end of an era. Kris goes on a girls’ trip to decompress from the decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Season of Change

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Guns and Rangers
programme.desc: The Pawn stars have a chance to buy a key from the 16th or 17th century, but it does not open doors, it shoots bullets.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Guns Blazing
programme.desc: One of the rarest guns in American history turns up at the shop. It's a race to the finish when a tire signed by legendary NASCAR driver Dale Earnhardt rolls on by.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lord of the Ring
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars say their prayers when a guy brings in a ring believed to have been owned by a Catholic Cardinal.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Secret Agent Man
programme.desc: A 2004 World Series player's ring is brought to shop, the year the Red Sox broke the curse of the Bambino. Then, Chumlee spies a toy James Bond Aston Martin from the 1960s, and the guys try to convince Rick to take a vacation.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bucking Bronco
programme.desc: Rick considers a signed copy of a Red Hot Chili Peppers album and Corey has a look at a Mobo Bronco toy. Later, Chum decides to bend the rules after getting in trouble for wearing a hat to work.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Titanic Pawn
programme.desc: A 1906 Silver Half Dollar that belonged to a passenger on the Titanic and a first-edition copy of 'The Strange Case of Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde' make their way to the shop. Also, a 1936 Zeiss 16mm camera turns up.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pops Pawn
programme.desc: An astrological armillary sphere; a British Smarties candy dispenser; a signed Louis Armstrong photo and handkerchief; a vintage Ghirardelli billboard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Death and Taxidermy
programme.desc: Get spooked out with the Pawn Stars when a 1547 edition of 'The Dance of Death' haunts the shop. Next, things get whimsical when two sculptures from Dr. Seuss' unorthodox taxidermy collection are brought in. A tear-gas baton forces its way into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Another Day
programme.desc: Madonna's 1988 day planner; a 1910 phrenology head; an 1800s locket with preacher Henry Ward Beecher; a 1980s egg chair used for hearing tests.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Under Pressure
programme.desc: A drawing of John Lennon; Senator William Sharon's engraved menu from the Comstock Lode; a Role water pressure tester; a 1950s Buddy Lee doll.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Thar She Pawns
programme.desc: Rick goes to check out a 1974 Triumph Convertible. Two whale spears find their way into the shop. Chum reminisces over a pair of Popeye water pistols.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Stamp Stumped
programme.desc: Rick debates whether a few gold and silver coins are worth cashing in for. Corey struggles to determine the value of some peculiar tax stamps. Chumlee is thrilled when a signed Bob Marley album enters the shop. Rick ponders concertina lessons.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum's Risky Business
programme.desc: Chumlee is holding out for a superhero when a seller brings in boxes upon boxes of inherited comic books. Rick learns you have to buy money to make money when some rare turn of the century currency hits his counter.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Top Rope, Bottom Dollar
programme.desc: An ancient tome might hold some alchemist secrets for Rick and Chum. A signed wrestling costume has Corey and Chum debating over its worth. A half dollar claimed to have been dinged by Annie Oakley may be worth its hefty price.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Devil Went Down to Vegas
programme.desc: A paratrooper folding bike from World War II crosses the Pawn Stars' path. Corey is face to face with an antique German clock. A fiddle signed by singer Charlie Daniels has Rick itching to make a deal. An old miner's self-rescuer finds Rick.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Can't Pawn Me Love
programme.desc: The Venetian Hotel hosts some pricey illustrations from the children's book, 'Where the Wild Things Are,' which greatly intrigue Rick. At the shop, an ultra-rare Beatles vinyl collection impresses Chum. Chum also finds an antique hot dog bun warmer.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawned and Confused
programme.desc: A seller brings his Led Zeppelin vinyl collection to Rick and Chum. A fancy 19th century office desk may be a worthwhile buy. A game-used base from the 2016 World Series could be a home run for the guys. Rick takes a trip to see 'The Object.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pistol Is Mightier Than the Sword
programme.desc: Rick checks out a sword-pistol combo from the 1700s. A portrait of John Barrymore, the famous film and theatre actor, may be worth a buy. Rick learns about an antique navigational timepiece from the 19th century. Corey's excited about a 1969 Harley.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Raiders of the Lost Pawn

programme.desc: An affluent grandmother falls victim to an elaborate murder plot fueled by passion and greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Deborah Pieringer
programme.desc: When the bodies of two grandparents are tragically found left for dead, investigators toil to determine whether the slayings were motivated by simmering vengeance or insatiable greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Melissa Patterson
programme.desc: After an endearing World War II veteran and family man is laid to rest from apparent natural causes, a surprise witness surfaces with murder accusations, sparking a police investigation into a devious predator.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unimaginable
programme.desc: The case made national headlines: A toddler left in the car for seven hours while his dad was at work. Was this a heartbreaking accident? Police said it was murder. Could any parent ever do this on purpose?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House on the Lake

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayed
programme.desc: Melissa Lewis disappeared leaving signs of a struggle and a strange orange mist behind her. Later, her boss went missing and left behind an even bigger mess, including a missing fortune. Two crimes leaving one lingering mystery.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash Valley Extended Stay: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: At an Indiana correctional facility housing 2000 convicted felons, an infamous inmate tries to convince prison officials that he's changed, while staff investigates a potential escape plot.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: When a beloved elderly woman is viciously murdered, detectives discover a chilling connection to another unsolved murder. The trail points to someone from her past and investigators race to hunt the killer down before they can strike again.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: A Genius Murder
programme.desc: When a brilliant scientist and devoted family man is found beaten to death, the evidence leads police to make arrests, but an astounding revelation turns the investigation on its head.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Gone Without a Trace
programme.desc: A divorced mother of three is savagely stabbed to death while recovering from major surgery, but police are frustrated by a lack of evidence. After turning cold, the case is reignited by a startling admission that finally leads police to the killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Man Who Wasn't There

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Back to the Suture
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: My Fair Piggy
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair is just around the corner, which means Dr. Pol, Dr. Emily and Dr. Brenda are busy treating fair animals, making sure they are in tiptop shape for competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: The staff of Pol Vet Services has one head scratcher after another, from the peculiar to the downright bizarre. With over 19,000 clients, it's only a matter of time before the vets are presented with a unique case that they've never seen before.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cowhide and Seek
programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Fix-It-All
programme.desc: Clients take matters into their own hands and our vets have a slew of do-it-yourself doctoring to repair. As if they're not busy enough at the clinic, Dr. Pol, Diane and Charles embark on some ambitious home improvement projects at the lake house.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Feline and Sinker
programme.desc: From gimpy goats to belligerent bulls, families all around are relying on Pol Veterinary Service to take care of their animals this summer.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: How Now Downed Cow?
programme.desc: In another emergency farm call, Dr. Pol must treat a dairy cow with a Left Displaced Abomasum, or a twisted stomach, which means that one of the cow's four stomachs has floated to the top of the abdominal cavity.

programme.title: Wizard of Paws: Avery
programme.desc: Derrick tackles a prosthetics project for Avery, an energetic golden retriever with deformed paws.

programme.title: Wizard of Paws: Turbo Charged
programme.desc: Two Chihuahuas need Derricks help to keep up with their loving family.

programme.title: Wizard of Paws: Lightning
programme.desc: Lightning is a curious and gentle six-month-old miniature dwarf pony born with deformed hooves.

programme.title: Wizard of Paws: Picture Pearl-fect
programme.desc: Pearl is missing one of her paws and Derrick can help with a new design.

programme.title: The Wild Life of Dr. Ole: Howls and Owls
programme.desc: Doc Ole helps restore the endangered Mexican gray wolf to the Arizona wildlife.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Oil Rig vs. Sinkhole
programme.desc: When an oil rig in a Louisiana lake drills in the wrong place, it causes a massive whirlpool that drains the entire lake; experts investigate why this sinkhole disaster was one of the greatest engineering catastrophes in American history.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco
programme.desc: Montreal's Olympic Stadium was an ambitious engineering project with a striking Space Age design, but it's distinctive roof had caused over one billion dollars in cost overruns. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science can fix it.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Swamp Monster
programme.desc: When an oil rig in Louisiana drills into something unexpected, a cataclysmic event is unleashed, causing a lake to suddenly disappear; experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Mayhem in Minneapolis
programme.desc: A deadly design flaw results in a horrifying rush hour bridge collapse that tragically leaves 13 dead in Minneapolis. Using the latest science, experts investigate to reveal what went so catastrophically wrong on one of Minnesota's busiest crossings.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Largest Crane Vessel
programme.desc: The largest semi-submersible crane vessel in the world pushes the limits of engineering possibilities, and with its two record-breaking cranes, it's one of the most complex ships ever constructed and redefines how we build at sea.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Army's Super Tank
programme.desc: The US Army's Abrams tank is a 70-ton war machine capable of reaching speeds of 45 miles per hour on the most extreme terrains on earth, but before it enters the battlefield, it must face a set of brutal challenges to put its engineering to the test.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Mayhem in Minneapolis
programme.desc: A deadly design flaw results in a horrifying rush hour bridge collapse that tragically leaves 13 dead in Minneapolis. Using the latest science, experts investigate to reveal what went so catastrophically wrong on one of Minnesota's busiest crossings.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Largest Crane Vessel
programme.desc: The largest semi-submersible crane vessel in the world pushes the limits of engineering possibilities, and with its two record-breaking cranes, it's one of the most complex ships ever constructed and redefines how we build at sea.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Army's Super Tank
programme.desc: The US Army's Abrams tank is a 70-ton war machine capable of reaching speeds of 45 miles per hour on the most extreme terrains on earth, but before it enters the battlefield, it must face a set of brutal challenges to put its engineering to the test.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Mafia Island
programme.desc: A Mediterranean island paradise is not all that it seems; its complex of abandoned buildings were once prisons for the world's most dangerous Mafiosi; experts investigate new evidence to reveal who was imprisoned here and the secrets they left behind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Pushing the Line: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Friends and rivals try to walk thin, nylon ropes stretched 500 feet in the air. On the line, the daredevils push each other to try increasingly dangerous stunts and break records. Off the line, who's hooking up and who's breaking up adds more tension.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of Disaster Park
programme.desc: A collection of ramshackle structures with a mystical facade lie mysteriously deserted on the tropical island of Bali. Experts investigate and uncover the ruins of a bizarre amusement park complex with a disastrous past.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Impossible Perpetrator
programme.desc: When teen Candace Hiltz is shot dead in Prison Valley, the cops pursue her troubled brother James. With no evidence against him, the case goes cold until ten years later when a cop's storage unit is discovered to contain evidence in Candace's murder.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: High School Horror
programme.desc: When the body of beautiful high school student Debbie Gama is discovered in a creek wrapped in wire, the ensuing investigation ends up uncovering more than her murderer, revealing a secret world of twisted sex, drugs, sadomasochism and bondage.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Remorse
programme.desc: Robin Sowders is brutally beaten in his home in Bloomington, Indiana and later dies from his injuries. When his wife turns up at the police station, the investigation turns on its head. Only a wiretap will eventually reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Cover the Camera and I'll Talk
programme.desc: The Sheriff's Office in Virginia's Isle of Wight County discovers a double homicide involving an 80-year-old disabled grandmother. An undercover informant, a hidden handgun, and an unusual confession all lead to convictions in this cold-blooded crime.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Move Out
programme.desc: Kiana Marshall, her brother Corey, and their friend Alexis are murdered. Now, bodycam and CCTV capture the hunt for their insane killer. Twisted tales lead detectives on a wild goose chase, but the killers are revealed and must face the consequences.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Home Carlie
programme.desc: February 1st 2004. 11-year-old Carlie Brucia disappears while walking home from a friend's house. Police discover security camera footage of her shocking abduction and the inquiry becomes a manhunt.

programme.title: See No Evil: Four and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Larry Howse is a dedicated father of two sons. But in August 2013, Larry is found shot dead in his apartment's parking garage in Tacoma, Washington. Police have little to go on until a security camera reveals grainy footage of two mystery assailants.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Move Out
programme.desc: Kiana Marshall, her brother Corey, and their friend Alexis are murdered. Now, bodycam and CCTV capture the hunt for their insane killer. Twisted tales lead detectives on a wild goose chase, but the killers are revealed and must face the consequences.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Home Carlie
programme.desc: February 1st 2004. 11-year-old Carlie Brucia disappears while walking home from a friend's house. Police discover security camera footage of her shocking abduction and the inquiry becomes a manhunt.

programme.title: See No Evil: Loretta's Last Valentine
programme.desc: On February 14th, 2014, pregnant college student Loretta Saunders vanishes without trace. Her trail runs cold after she is spotted on CCTV at her apartment building. The race is now on to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: Murder Calls: No Good Deed Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: A woman calls 911, saying she's found her son unconscious in his home. When police arrive, they realize he's dead: his hands are bound and he's been strangled.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Death Mask
programme.desc: A concerned man calls 911 to say he's on the phone with his girlfriend, and she's in trouble. When police respond, her two frightened sons answer the door. Their mom has been beaten severely.

programme.title: My Dirty Little Secret: The Price of Murder
programme.desc: Joe and Tina Caronna are a financial power couple living the good live in the suburbs of Memphis, TN. But when Tina fails to show up for a party, local investigators discover that bad blood has long plagued this seemingly perfect southern family.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Straight Through the Heartland
programme.desc: Wendy gets more than she bargained for when she takes on babysitting job for Mr. Gulley.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder in the Poconos
programme.desc: Benjamin Amato and Cheryl Kunkle's May-December becomes complicated when Cheryl becomes pregnant with the couple's child. The former lovers are soon at war in court. But the day before their final custody hearing, a murder changes everything.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Hidden Truths
programme.desc: Indle King hasn't seen his wife Anastasia since she abandoned him at the Moscow airport. After returning to Seattle alone, Indle meets with the detectives tasked with unraveling the series of events that led to his bride's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Right-Hand Con-Man
programme.desc: Denver's real estate market is on fire. So when Wall Street veteran Ken Germain promises big bucks everyone jumps aboard, including his right-hand man Colin Collea. But when the dream turns to dust, a raging mob of those betrayed, scream bloody murder.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love Goes South
programme.desc: Lonely musician Ray Merrill thinks he's found his dream woman in Brazil through an online dating website. But as the exotic romance heats up, money starts to go missing.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: No, You Don't!
programme.desc: In Florida, a woman shopping for bathing suits bravely chases after a man who harasses her and learns that he's a predator who's been preying on women for years. And then, two good samaritans intervene when an elderly couple is robbed.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Child's Nightmare
programme.desc: As a car heads straight into the ocean, with screaming children hanging out the windows crying for help, bystanders rush in to try and help.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Growing Up Buttafuoco
programme.desc: Nearly three decades ago, then 17-year-old Amy Fisher dubbed 'Long Island Lolita' by media shot Mary Jo Buttafuoco on her front porch following an affair with her husband, Joey Buttafuoco. Jessie Buttafuoco reflects on her life after the shooting.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Growing Up Buttafuoco
programme.desc: Nearly three decades ago, then 17-year-old Amy Fisher dubbed 'Long Island Lolita' by media shot Mary Jo Buttafuoco on her front porch following an affair with her husband, Joey Buttafuoco. Jessie Buttafuoco reflects on her life after the shooting.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: It Was All Judith
programme.desc: When Corey Breininger was a child, his stepmother, Judith Hawkey, coerced him into doing something horrible. Tormented by guilt, he kept her deadly secret for years. Knowing what she was capable of, he wasn't sure he could tell the truth and live.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Not in My Yard
programme.desc: A rash of break-ins shatters the peace in a tight community, and when residents take sides along the fault lines; good friends turn into deadly enemies.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet spy war.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Tropical Twists
programme.desc: There's nothing like kicking back in the tropics.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Pool-a-Vida
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Florida to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home. Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot, Charred and Crispy
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff joins Michael Symon at one of his most treasured New Orleans spots.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Michael Symon digs into a spicy burger that uses four different types of peppers to fire up even the most adventurous eaters in Hell's Kitchen, New York City, before heading to Nashville, where he finds Southern comforts infused with Latin flavors.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem for an Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Campfire Creations
programme.desc: Noah follows smoke signals to the fairground. He chows down on midway food inspired by cooking over an open campfire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzella Queen of the Dessert
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe enjoys German inspired carnival treats at Christkindlmarket Milwaukee. First Noah digs into the Austrian Alpine Daug which packs a cheese-stuffed bratwurst into a hearty roll topped with sauerkraut and potato salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Return of the Mac
programme.desc: Noah Cappe digs in to seven ooey-gooey versions of the classic American casserole. Whether it's stacked in a sandwich, layered in a hot dog, rolled into a taco or topped with lobster, these mac and cheese creations are crave-worthy carnival treats.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Cheesy Dishes
programme.desc: Roger Mooking says 'Cheese' as he explores 15 of the best cheesy dishes across the U.S. The creamiest, smoothest and stringiest French, Italian, Mexican and American cheesy classics and innovations are on display.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Chow Down Meat Town
programme.desc: From slow-smoked bison ribs in Colorado to chicken wings topped with cinnamon sugar and icing in Rhode Island, we hunt down proteins that satisfy every carnivorous craving.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Brew and Chew
programme.desc: The best bar food at the some of the best small breweries across the country is highlighted. From ale-glazed wings to beer-braised pork shoulder, beer has gone from a frosty sidekick to a key ingredient, and diners are ready to drink it all in.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Barbecue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cannot resist the sweet, succulent smoky goodness of barbecue as he canvasses the country on the lookout for the fifteen best barbecue dishes wherever he can find them.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases some of the best of coastal cuisine in a top 15 countdown of the most delicious dishes inspired by America's oceans, lakes and rivers. There are wasabi salmon burgers in Alaska, crab cakes by the Chesapeake Bay and more in between.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy for Chicken
programme.desc: Roger travels across Massachusetts to meet two chefs who are putting a brand new spin on fire-roasted, rotisserie chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Small Packages, Big Flavors
programme.desc: Good things come in small packages, and that is especially true when it comes to artisanal food makers. Roger searches the Gulf Sates for tasty food with big flavor.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Low Country Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger's in charming South Carolina for two spectacular low country cookouts: a traditional backyard pig pickin' and a classic oyster roast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cali Cookout
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets San Francisco-based chef Thomas McNaughton at a farm in Healdsburg, Calif., for a live-fire feast of epic proportions. They affix a whole pig to a metal cross to cook over hot coals for several hours.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Taste of Texas
programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Heatwave to Heartland
programme.desc: Summer is sizzling on the West Coast and Noah Cappe is ready to cool things down with a hazel nutty deep fried pop. Meanwhile, in the Midwest, Reverend Tom’s cowboy beans makes a believer out of fairgoers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burger Bonanza
programme.desc: In this episode, Noah Cappe explores the huge variety of options carnival cooks have come up with to honor America's much loved sandwich. From classic beef burgers to exotic meats, buns made from pretzels and even donuts, these burgers will inspire you.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Funnel Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe drops in on central California's Placer County Fair, the home of some one-of-a-kind fair foods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Hot 'n' Spicy

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Grillin' It
programme.desc: Since humans first discovered cooking with fire, they've been perfecting the art of the grill. Eddie Jackson chases after the smoky undertones and sweet, bitter char that only flame-grilling creates.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Art for Art's Sake/ Mancave
programme.desc: Brittany takes up painting to impress her fashion idol. But her idol only likes her art after Alvin accidentally ruins it. Alvin, convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move into their home, tries to stop it.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Is for Alien/ Jeanette Enchanted
programme.desc: When Theodore disappears from his bed, Alvin is positive that he has been kidnapped by aliens. The Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer Jeanette a magical, fairy-tale birthday.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit
programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Albrittina/ Simon for President
programme.desc: When Alvin catches Simon taking a test to discover his soul mate, he decides to do the same and prove just how silly the test really is. Simon and Alvin decide to rebel and launch their own campaigns for class president.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Clowning Around/ Bully for You
programme.desc: Theodore is desperate to land the part of the monster in the school play, so Alvin decides to show Theodore how to really scare people. Simon builds a homemade robot body-guard, that helps him stand up to the bullies.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners
programme.desc: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him a replica of the car. Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the Princess of England.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: DuckTales: Daytrip of Doom!
programme.desc: The nephews take Webby to Funso's Fun Zone and have a dangerous run-in with the Beagle Boys. Donald rebels against Mrs. Beakley's strict "house rules."

programme.title: DuckTales: The Missing Links of Moorshire!
programme.desc: Dewey's natural golf abilities challenge Scrooge's ego while a seemingly innocent, mystical golf course leads the group into trouble.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Give Me All Your Cheese
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Royal Rumble
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Undercover Carl/ Hip Hip Parade
programme.desc: When Carl intercepts blue prints for Phineas and Ferb's Anti-Gravity Fun Launcher, he mistakenly thinks that they are assisting Dr. Doofenshmirtz with an evil plan so Major Monogram sends him incognito to uncover what the boys are doing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Just Passing Through/ Candace's Big Day
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create an orb that allows them to pass through solid objects and to ultimately, help them retrieve Mom's favourite guitar pick for her gig at the Mayor's Day Festival.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Times Circle/ Super Gramma
programme.desc: Tilly and Remy put on a sidewalk play while Cricket and Bill meet their favorite costumed superheroes. Cricket and Tilly try to keep Gramma at home while she recovers from eye surgery.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: A Hero Discovered
programme.desc: Rowan meets a Jedi named Naare and learns of the Kyber Saber.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: The Mines of Graballa
programme.desc: While attempting to retrieve a Kyber Saber Crystal from an asteroid field, Rowan is captured by Graballa the Hutt.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: Zander's Joyride
programme.desc: When Zander takes a classic starfighter out for a joyride, he winds up in the clutches of Darth Vader.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: The Lost Treasure of Cloud City
programme.desc: A hunt for precious cargo brings the Freemakers to Cloud City.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: Peril on Kashyyyk
programme.desc: Kordi's attempts to save money force the Freemakers into trouble on Kashyyyk.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: Crossing Paths
programme.desc: While on the run from Imperials, Luke and Leia show the Freemakers the selfless nature of the Force and the Rebellion.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: Race on Tatooine
programme.desc: The Freemakers are lured into a trap by Graballa.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: The Test
programme.desc: The Freemakers meet Hondo who gives them a seemingly simple job that turns out to be much harder than they thought.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: The Kyber Saber Crystal Chase
programme.desc: The Freemakers are in hot pursuit of the remaining Kyber Saber Crystals.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: The Maker of Zoh
programme.desc: The Freemakers travel to Zoh where they meet the Maker, who teaches Rowan how to build using the Force.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: Showdown on Hoth
programme.desc: The race for the Kyber Saber Crystals comes to an exciting finish on Hoth.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures: Duel of Destiny
programme.desc: It's Rowan versus Naare in a lightsaber duel with galactic consequences.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dante vs Delta!
Phineas and Ferb: Doof 101/ Father's Day
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz is sentenced to community service for being evil, and much to his daughter Vanessa's chagrin, he's assigned to teach science at her high school.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Operation Crumb Cake/ Mandace
programme.desc: Isabella sends a letter to Phineas admitting her true feelings, but instantly regrets her decision/ Doof invents an '-inator' to disguise himself as the local pizza delivery boy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tales From the Resistance
programme.desc: After Doofenshmirtz is defeated, a new threat in the Second Dimension emerges, leaving it up to Phineas, Ferb, Candace and her resistance fighters to defeat this new foe.
