programme.title: Military Makeover: Daniels Family: Episode 4
programme.desc: The Daniels makeover is in full swing as we inch closer to the big reveal.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Got to Be Real
programme.desc: Owen introduces Callie to the Veterans Hospital patients in hopes that she will help them with her robotic limb lab, Jo becomes jealous of Alex and Meredith's friendship, and Maggie continues to confide in Richard.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Only Mama Knows
programme.desc: Secrets from Ellis Grey's past come to light when Meredith watches old videos and reads through her mother's journals. Meanwhile, Maggie rocks the hospital with an unexpected announcement, and Alex gets new responsibilities.

programme.title: The Closer: Fatal Retraction
programme.desc: A botched murder investigation with faulty evidence is revealed after the body of a woman, believed to have been a murder victim of a death-row killer three years before, shows up in the morgue.

programme.title: The Closer: Standards and Practices
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer is murdered; an anonymous complaint for 'conduct unbecoming' is filed against Brenda.

programme.title: Major Crimes: All In
programme.desc: When a body turns up at a posh country club in a quite neighbourhood, the squad's investigation leads them down a money trail full of surprises. Meanwhile, Flynn is noticeably distracted on the job and Rusty questions Emma's intentions.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Curve Ball
programme.desc: Christmas vacation is interrupted for the division when a baseball scout is found dead in his RV. The squad works through the murder case, unfolding a complicated kidnapping scheme.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Risk Assessment
programme.desc: When a well-off graduate student gets shot to death in a gang-riddled neighbourhood, the division must work with the FBI to find his killer.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Year-End Blowout
programme.desc: A year-end-blowout sale becomes literal for a used car lot after one of its owners is killed when a bomb explodes. While the squad tries to find who is responsible, Rusty attempts to catch the person threatening his and Sharon's life.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Return to Sender
programme.desc: The squad must work quickly to track down a serial killer before he strikes again. Meanwhile, things get dangerous over a game of chess.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fire and Murder
programme.desc: Police are on the hunt for Robert William Fisher for the murder of his wife Mary Fisher and two children. Honolulu couple John and Julieanne Dimitrion were indicted for mortgage fraud, using victims' money to fund their own lavish lifestyles.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sacrament of Blood
programme.desc: Behind the cloak of his 'religion,' a Santeria priest allegedly murdered his lover, raped a minor and molested his step-daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Fire on the Forty
programme.desc: An inferno engulfs Marty and Mollee's cabin at the onset of winter and the Raneys must rally like never before to complete the unfinished clifftop cabin on The Upper 20 in record time complete with heat, water and power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Marty attempts a treacherous trip across a frozen river, in an effort to bring heat to the new cabin. Misty and Maciah build a pump house to secure the family's new water source on the Upper 20.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Count Your Blessings
programme.desc: With added features and bonus scenes: Marty devises a clever way to transport massive equipment across an impassable icy cliff. Matt brings a surprise to lift everyone's spirits.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: With several critical projects to complete, the Raneys face a season-ending winter storm. It's all-hands-on-deck as the family rushes to make the cabin livable through winter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Utah Desert Cabin
programme.desc: An overworked gymnastics coach begins work on his dream cabin in Utah's Wasatch Mountain Range. Malfunctioning equipment, being far from town, extreme weather and unpredictable wildlife threaten to turn his dream into a nightmare.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: With several critical projects to complete, the Raneys face a season-ending winter storm. It's all-hands-on-deck as the family rushes to make the cabin livable through winter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Utah Desert Cabin
programme.desc: An overworked gymnastics coach begins work on his dream cabin in Utah's Wasatch Mountain Range. Malfunctioning equipment, being far from town, extreme weather and unpredictable wildlife threaten to turn his dream into a nightmare.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaii Dome House
programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Return to the Big Island
programme.desc: A year after finding his father's fishing charts, Josh and Casey return to Hawaii to grow their fledgling fishing business. Finding an industry in ruin, they join with business partner, Jeff Silva, to devise a strategy to navigate the waters ahead.

programme.title: Captain Philips: Somali Pirates Inside Story
programme.desc: Told through eyewitness accounts, exclusive Navy footage and hijacked with extra facts, this is the story of Captain Phillips and crew aboard the Maersk Alabama and their dramatic rescue after being taken hostage by Somalian Pirates.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Dinosaur Cowboys
programme.desc: On the series premiere of Dino Hunters, dinosaur fossil season has begun and Montana rancher Clayton Phipps finds what might be an extremely rare and valuable fossil on his family's property. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his son uncover a triceratops horn.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Million-Dollar Dino
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps continues his excavation of a rare, carnivorous dinosaur on his Montana ranch. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and son Jake prepare to sell their prized T-Rex fossil. Aaron Bolan hunts for an Ankylosaurus.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Curse of the Carnivore
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps and his team prepare to flip a 20,000-pound carnivore fossil out of the earth and onto a flatbed to get it to the lab for analysis. Meanwhile, Mike Harris hunts for a duckbill skull and Jared Hudson uncovers an ancient reptile.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Shots Fired
programme.desc: Clayton must haul his 20,000-pound dinosaur fossil over 200 miles to a lab where it will finally be identified. The Harris/Bolan clan chases poachers off of their land and Jared makes a last-ditch effort to bring in some money this season.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: We Got Skull
programme.desc: With their prized carnivore fossil finally at the lab, Clayton returns to his ranch in Montana to hunt for quick finds at Old Faithful. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his team continue excavating their triceratops site hoping to uncover the valuable horns.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: The Verdict is In: Nano or T-Rex
programme.desc: In Montana, Clayton Phipps prepares to learn if his carnivore skeleton belongs to a T-Rex or the controversial nanotyrannus. Meanwhile in Wyoming, Mike Harris and Aaron Bolan race against the impending winter digging at a promising new site.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Winter Vortex: Part One
programme.desc: In the snowiest part of Wyoming, Matt and Joe demonstrate how to repurpose a broken down snowmobile, make shelter from snow, and survive sub-freezing temperatures in whiteout conditions that cause them to miss a chance at rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Winter Vortex: Part Two
programme.desc: Stranded in Wyoming's snowy mountains, Matt and Joe are threatened by hypothermia and predatory mountain lions. In frigid conditions, the pair takes their biggest risk yet by splitting up.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Fractured Journey
programme.desc: Matt and Joe take on one of the most common and deadly scenarios in the wilderness: an injury that requires medical intervention. Caught in a thick jungle, this worst-case becomes a test of will in the struggle to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Braving Bolivia
programme.desc: Joe and Matt face a journey of epic proportions in the Bolivian Andes. From the world's largest salt flat 12,000 feet above sea level through a desert with toxic water and into mountain peaks, they're in a constant battle against dehydration and altitude.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Enter the Promised Land
programme.desc: The team finally gains access to the potential motherlode in the Hummocks. But as soon as the crew begins, Box Creek is hit by a huge snow storm and Jason makes an alarming discovery.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Megan's Story
programme.desc: At 24 years old and over 600 lbs, Megan lives at home with her mom, who cooks for her since Megan can't do much on her own. Now, Megan must travel to Houston to meet Dr. Now and change her eating habit or her life may end before it ever begins.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Adventures in Pimplepopping

programme.desc: When a young woman is executed on a street corner, investigator Nathan Schilling discovers her circle of friends may all be connected to the murder.

programme.title: The First 48: Fatal Mistake
programme.desc: A night out leaves an innocent man dead. When solid leads hit dead ends, detectives discover a motive they never expected.

programme.title: The First 48: Dangerous Business

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: Todd Kendhammer
programme.desc: What seemed like a freak traffic accident soon becomes a suspected mover cover-up. Todd Kendhammer takes the stand to convince a jury that he would never hurt his wife Barbara.

programme.desc: Find out which Joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr offer evocative responses when taste testing new food. Plus, tonight's loser gets sent to a place far, far away.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: OK Zoomer
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe help job seekers land their next big gig and pitch their memoirs to a focus group. The losing joker will deliver news heard around the world.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rock Bottom

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: The guys advertise incompetence to a group of agency executives, are forced into dirty deeds as custodians in a mall food court and tempt their fates by returning to the wheel of doom.

programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deception
programme.desc: Wendy Ratte, a free-spirited mother of two, was missing. Police investigated: a bitter feud with a neighbor, a possible serial killer. Or, did danger lurk closer to home? It'd take an elaborate, undercover mission to finally crack this case.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Miami Heat
programme.desc: A father and his infant son were shot on the streets of Miami. The son survived, the father didn’t and a widow was left wracked with grief. Then, there was another murder and police had to figure out whether it was a revenge killing or self-defense.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Heath Bar Farm
programme.desc: A popular teacher was savagely murdered in her home. There would be an arrest, a trial, and a conviction. When a bombshell came in after the verdict, the convicted murderer was given a chance at freedom.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: Big sky country and a dangerous highway set the scene of a fatal car crash. Was the tragedy an accident, or was the crash a crime, were the secrets masking the truth hiding in text messages sent just before a car crossed the line.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Man Who Wasn't There
programme.desc: He was the hardworking dad, she the doting mom. In the still of the night, strangers armed with knives destroyed all they had built together. Turns out, someone was hiding an ugly secret. Police would hatch an elaborate plan to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in a Small Town
programme.desc: Her life ended in mystery on a dead-end road. A mother of three, she was beloved by her family and tight-knit community. For years the murder investigation went cold, however secrets have a way of eventually coming out.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash Valley Extended Stay: Father Figure
programme.desc: The killer of a corrections officer fights to be freed from 16 years of solitary confinement, and boyhood friends struggle to parent their kids from behind prison walls.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bondurants
programme.desc: A pair of larger than life identical twins commit a series of brutal attacks in a small Tennessee town. With each crime, the brothers grow more emboldened. As time goes on and with little evidence against them, there's no telling how far they'll go.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Brileys
programme.desc: Over a brutal 7-month stretch, a trio of brothers commit a series of increasingly violent crimes across the city of Richmond, leaving behind a growing body count. Even after their apprehension, these brothers prove difficult to contain.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rosas
programme.desc: After a man is found brutally murdered inside his own bar a murder mystery unfolds over the span of years. Detectives believe it's a business deal gone bad and must remain steadfastly dedicated to the case after hitting several dead ends.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Client
programme.desc: Beverly Carter, a beloved mother, wife and a successful real estate broker had a long list of clients. Then she vanished. Like all-too-many missing persons cases, police knew it was a race against time to find her, before it was too late.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Consumed
programme.desc: In January of 2014, a loving mother was found dead in her burned home near Paducah, Kentucky. What first appeared to be a terrible accident, turned into a lurid tale of deception and murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Full Moon
programme.desc: A Las Vegas cocktail waitress and loving mother is murdered in her home, leading authorities to wonder if there was a predator at large. When detectives find the killer, it is clear that their investigation is just getting started.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Orange County
programme.desc: An Army veteran vanishes before her college graduation. A massive search turns up nothing, but detectives do find a clue: a cryptic 911 call that helps uncover the truth and exposes a twisted story of unrequited love.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Unseen Assassin
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman and his closest friend are found shot execution style, leaving police with little to go on until a surprising development leads investigators to a killer no one ever suspected.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Second Chance to Kill
programme.desc: Police hunting the killer of a beloved grandfather believe his missing truck holds the key to the case. After hunting down suspect after suspect, local PD found a killer close to home, wielding a shocking kill weapon in a story of sickening betrayal.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: The Finger of Suspicion
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is killed in her own bedroom and the evidence appears to point a clear suspect, but police soon discover not everything is as it seems. It takes 30 years and stunning new evidence to reveal a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: The Runaway Murderer

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: When a beloved elderly woman is viciously murdered, detectives discover a chilling connection to another unsolved murder. The trail points to someone from her past and investigators race to hunt the killer down before they can strike again.

programme.desc: Beginning in Kathmandu, Josh Gates heads high into the Himalayas of Nepal to obtain scientific evidence of the legendary Yeti. This time his mission is personal, and it will take him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: The Monster and the Mountain
programme.desc: Josh ascends higher into the Himalayas to explore caves, examine ancient artifacts, and investigate the mystical ties the legendary creature holds with the Nepalese people.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Out of Thin Air
programme.desc: The hunt for the Yeti continues as Josh's quest takes him from the frozen slopes of Mount Everest to the isolated forests of Bhutan, where Josh uses bait to force a more personal encounter with the creature.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Unmasking the Myth
programme.desc: Josh rafts into the remotest corners of Bhutan to capture some of his best evidence yet of the reclusive creature. Then he returns to the US where all of his samples are analyzed to find out if the Yeti is real.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Plague on Hell Island
programme.desc: A strange sea fortress that guards icy waters is home to a grim secret. Experts investigate the mysteries at this eerie structure, which fought an invisible enemy far more deadly than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Secrets of the Star Disk
programme.desc: An ancient bronze disk adorned with gold may contain the oldest images of the cosmos ever discovered; using new research and the latest tech, experts investigate if this artifact could be the work of a prehistoric astrologer or just an elaborate hoax.

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Relic That Sees the Future
programme.desc: A bizarre 3,000 year-old gold relic crafted with intricately designed cryptic patterns is believed to form a highly complex celestial code. Using advanced imaging technology, experts speculate that it could be an ancient device for predicting the future.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Plague on Hell Island
programme.desc: A strange sea fortress that guards icy waters is home to a grim secret. Experts investigate the mysteries at this eerie structure, which fought an invisible enemy far more deadly than ever imagined.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya
programme.desc: Deep in the jungle, the lost city of Tikal holds the dark secrets of the Maya, and now, a new investigation uncovers how it grew into a megacity home to 100,000 people, and why it was mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Blood Pyramids
programme.desc: Giant pyramids at a strange site in Mexico are revealing the bloody secrets of a mysterious civilization that vanished 1,400 years ago. Little is known about this lost culture, but new discoveries are uncovering shocking evidence of human sacrifice.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Sunken Treasures
programme.desc: Egypt's ultimate secrets could be hidden underwater, and a cutting-edge archaeological investigation uses hi-tech methods to scan the ocean floor in search of sunken sphinxes, temples, and shipwrecks.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Pyramids of the Americas
programme.desc: At an ancient city lost in the desert for 5,000 years, experts uncover evidence of human sacrifice and strange rituals. New discoveries reveal that the people who lived here might have been the first civilization of the Americas.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Terror in Texas
programme.desc: When a gigantic sinkhole threatens a small town in Texas, engineers use the latest cutting-edge tech in a race to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Pit of Doom NYC
programme.desc: When a sinkhole suddenly sucks a man through a Brooklyn crosswalk, engineers use the latest cutting-edge tech in a race to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Nightmare in the Bayou
programme.desc: When a dangerous sinkhole suddenly spawns in a Louisiana bayou, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastation and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: When Florida Attacks
programme.desc: When a cluster of deadly sinkholes begins to engulf a Florida neighborhood, engineers use the latest cutting-edge tech in a race to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: The Thing That Ate Florida
programme.desc: Monster sinkholes ravage homes and cities in Florida, and engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking the Sunshine State.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Florida Hell Hole
programme.desc: When a sinkhole suddenly forms beneath a Florida resort, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Human+: The Future of Our Senses: The Orchestra of the Senses
Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Schooled in Murder
programme.desc: A lunch break devolves into a nightmare for two school secretaries who disappear in broad daylight. One woman is found dead, launching an intense search for her missing friend. As police collect evidence, they suspect the culprit has ties to the school.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Dumped and Dangerous
programme.desc: When their love life goes sour these Deadly Women take lethal revenge. They are 'Dumped and Dangerous.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love of Money
programme.desc: These Deadly Women sacrificed their loved ones to satisfy their 'Love of Money.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Blood for Money
programme.desc: Money is the driving force behind many crimes, especially murder. These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people's babies - they spilt Blood for Money.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Sable-Eyed Beauty
programme.desc: When a body found dumped in a gritty Brooklyn neighborhood is later identified as criminal justice student Imette St. Guillen, detectives must retrace her final hours at a Manhattan bar to catch her killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Sour Grapes
programme.desc: Two women with a shared wall between their townhouses become increasingly volatile with each other as their once good relationship disintegrates. Food fights, physical altercations, and mutual vandalism will finally come to a bloody climax.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Guess I've Got No Conscience
programme.desc: A woman's body is found strangled and partially nude off the side of a Connecticut country road. Investigators apprehend a suspect in her murder, only to discover he's a prolific serial killer - responsible for the rape and the murder of eight women.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Chase Me
programme.desc: A 50-year-old woman is found dead in her home. All that's left behind is a note that reads, 'Chase me.' But when detectives uncover the killer, they quickly discover they have come face to face with a remorseless psychopath.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Sable-Eyed Beauty

programme.desc: These deadly women liked company when they killed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Broken Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women brutally turned on family and in-laws.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Murder on the Sunset Strip
programme.desc: In 1980, a brutal serial killer abducts women from downtown Los Angeles and dumps their bodies in bizarre places. When an unidentified caller telephones police, they must decipher fact from fiction as the woman confesses to a bizarre series of events.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Only Two Remain
programme.desc: A husband is bludgeoned to death in his home. His wife and father-in-law claim it was self-defense. But when investigators take a closer at the crime scene, the story of what really happened that night will be put into question.

programme.title: Rebecca Zahau: An ID Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When 32-year-old Rebecca Zahau and 6-year-old Max Shacknai both die under mysterious circumstances at the same Coronado mansion, two families begin to search for answers and come to startling conclusions.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: She Gave No Warning
programme.desc: When two young women vanish without a trace, investigators are haunted by the things they leave behind - a car with the keys still in the ignition, a pair of shoes and a coat. They disappear with no warning.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Her Last Night Out
programme.desc: They head out into the night, full of youthful life and promise, but they never come back. Now, clues from behind bars may help solve the mysteries that surround the disturbing disappearances of two women.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Where's Crystal
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears on a busy Fourth of July weekend it marks the beginning of a disturbing mystery, one that will devastate a loving family and tear a small community apart.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Student of Murder
programme.desc: The death of a Seattle wine steward driving home puts the city on edge. The murder grabbed headlines and the attention of the city's commuters. Investigators need to determine if this was a random act of road rage or just a killer looking for kicks.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Sugar and Spite
programme.desc: A father has his daughter's life all planned out - with secrets hiding at home & high hopes for the future, it will end in terror. Later, when sinister forces are at work, even a father's love to his daughter has its limits.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Michelle Donohue wants a loving and well-off family of her own. She burns through good men, valuing wealth more than love. But when she finally meets Mr. Right she gets a taste of her own medicine, sending her down a path of murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: Killing with Kindness
programme.desc: Kind-hearted cashier Elizabeth Grosskopf scoops up human strays like puppies until one wants more than just food and shelter, but also her life.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Two Men and A Slaying
programme.desc: A man rents out a room to an old buddy, but their contrasting living habits create chaos in the house. Tiny arguments turn into petty crimes, resulting in a vicious fight that turns deadly.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Fighting Forces
programme.desc: Learn about some of the greatest fighting forces in history.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: After getting arrested for robbery, Robert Askew runs from a work camp and goes back to stealing to make a living. Askew eventually gets caught again, but he escapes from jail during a hurricane and goes on a crime spree, breaking into vacation homes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Work on a Crab Boat
programme.desc: Kenneth 'Speedy' Raulerson is wanted in Florida for armed robbery. He flees to Alaska to work the crab boats. After six months, he returns to the backwoods of Florida. Raulerson knows he will eventually be caught and is prepared to go down fighting.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Silence a Witness
programme.desc: An Oklahoma drug lord killed a man for revenge, and fled to Mexico to escape prosecution.

programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!
programme.desc: A young couple's new vacation home in Crystal Beach, Texas, requires a full gut, including a new kitchen, new bathrooms and a master suite. As walls are opened and floors are torn up, they realize their budget might not cover everything.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fishing for a Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Major Makeover in Maryland

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Revamp on the Outer Banks
The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Road Trip
programme.desc: Hears some of the best food stops around America from Food Network celebrities.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out
programme.desc: We're paying tribute to the best styles, cuts and steakhouses serving up the best steaks. Chef Jonathon Sawyer takes us on a trip to Dayton for a ribeye cut so incredibly, it's fit for a king.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Nova Scotia
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores iconic dishes of picturesque Nova Scotia, Canada, which became a fishing hub after being settled by Europeans in the 16th century. The proximity to the sea -- it's never more than 42 miles away!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Calabria
programme.desc: Andrew showcases Calabria, a rugged region in the toe of Italy's boot. The area sees a diverse range of ingredients that shine in signature dishes like fileja noodles with goat and parmigiana di melanzane.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seville
programme.desc: Andrew explores the capitol of Andalusian culture, Seville, Spain.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Miami
programme.desc: Blend of old-world immigrants and new-wave trendsetters bring a mix of flavour to Miami.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Iowa
programme.desc: Andrew discovers a world of unexpected flavors in the middle of America's heartland when he makes a visit to Iowa! From head cheese and pickled onion to a Sudanese stew, Andrew finds out that there's a lot more than meat and potatoes on the table in Iowa!

programme.desc: A neurotic con man enters his daughter's life, while his partner plans a big swindle.

programme.title: Movie: Rock of Ages

programme.title: Movie: Wrong Turn

programme.title: Movie: Sacrifice

programme.title: Movie: Moonlight

programme.title: Movie: The Rental
programme.desc: A perfect weekend getaway takes a dangerous turn when two couples suspect that their host has twisted intentions. No one is safe as secrets are exposed and old friends are forced to confront past demons and betrayals.

programme.title: Movie: The Crying Game

programme.title: Movie: Far From Heaven
programme.desc: In 1950's Connecticut, a housewife faces a marital crisis and mounting racial tensions.

programme.title: Movie: The Saint

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebb Tide
programme.desc: Dorothy accompanies Blanche to Atlanta for Big Daddy's funeral.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Have Yourself a Very Little Christmas
programme.desc: Christmas is driving everyone a little crazy as they all search for the perfect gifts.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mary Has a Little Lamb
programme.desc: Dorothy aids a pregnant and unwed teen who was rejected by her father.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Rose is touting the power of positive thinking; Blanche's beau has a heart attack.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Triple Play
programme.desc: Miles introduces Rose to his daughter Caroline; Blanche rents a Mercedes to attract men.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Clinton Avenue Memoirs
programme.desc: After digging out the family album, Sophia wants to visit their old home in Brooklyn.

programme.title: Movie: Royal Matchmaker
programme.desc: A struggling NYC matchmaker is hired by a king to find his son a suitable wife in time for a national celebration.

programme.title: Movie: Love at the Shore
programme.desc: A successful and driven single mom plans a working vacation to her parents where she and her kids encounter the next door neighbour, a confident devil-may-care surfer.

programme.title: Movie: Playing Cupid
programme.desc: A man is secretly set-up with his daughter's teacher as part of a matchmaking project.

programme.title: Movie: The Last Bridesmaid
programme.desc: A woman is focused on taking over her family business, instead of looking for a man. All her friends are getting married and she seems to get new invitations in the mail weekly. While at a wedding, she meets a documentarian, and he changes her life.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara
programme.desc: Everyone travels to Niagara Falls for Jim and Pam's wedding. The guys try to hook up while everyone tries to keep Pam's pregnancy a secret.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara
programme.desc: Pam deals with Andy's sensitive injury; Kevin loses his shoes on the day of the wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Mafia
programme.desc: An insurance salesman meets with Michael and Dwight and Andy convince him that the salesman is part of the mafia. Pam's painting is accidentally ruined by Erin.

programme.title: The Office: The Lover
programme.desc: Michael reveals the identity of the woman he is dating to Jim and Pam. Dwight apologizes to Jim for tormenting him over the years with an odd peace offering.

programme.title: The Office: Koi Pond
programme.desc: The office plans a haunted house for the children of the community. Michael falls into a koi pond while at an important meeting. Pam and Andy try cold calling for more sales.

programme.title: The Office: Double Date
programme.desc: Jim and Pam have no choice but to go out with Michael and Helene, as their excuses have dried up. Dwight does nice things for the people in the office.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Motel Guest
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira have to deal with a surprise motel guest while Alexis and David go apartment hunting.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Lawn Signs
programme.desc: Moira's campaign takes a turn when some of her lawn signs mysteriously disappear. David and Alexis must work together to get David's boss out of legal trouble.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Happy Anniversary
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira go out for their anniversary and run into a couple they knew from their former life. Meanwhile, Alexis and David attend Mutt's annual barn party, making up with some friends and making out with others.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Opening Night
programme.desc: Johnny struggles to find a new purpose, while Moira must confront the harsh realities of local politics.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Throuple
programme.desc: David and Stevie must come to terms with their new relationship, while Alexis and Moira become anxious when they schedule a rare mother/daughter lunch.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: New Car
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira feign poverty in an attempt to get a deal on a used car, while David helps Stevie lay her great-aunt to rest.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland
programme.desc: When the entire contents of the world's imagination lay open before them, Stan and Kyle step right in. Back in South Park, Cartman swears he's seen a leprechaun.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode II
programme.desc: After the wall in Imaginationland is blown up by terrorists, the evil side crosses over. Cartman tracks down Kyle and Stan at the Pentagon and demands Kyle makes good on their agreement. Meanwhile, U.S. troops cross over into Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode III
programme.desc: Inside Imaginationland, Stan and Butters engage in the battle of their lives as they fight the army of evil imaginary forces. Meanwhile, Cartman goes all the way to the Supreme Court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet.

programme.title: South Park: Bloody Mary
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed in front of his friends when his father gets pulled over for driving under the influence of alcohol. Meanwhile, a bleeding statue of Mary is discovered and the faithful are flocking to the site, hoping for miraculous healings.

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure
programme.desc: To get back at his parents for not letting him go to a concert, Kyle tells the police that his parents molested him. Soon, the whole town is free of adults and divided into two rival factions.

programme.title: South Park: A Million Little Fibers
programme.desc: Towelie writes a book about his experiences getting over a drug addiction. With Oprah's help, the book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around, until the dame of daytime television catches Towelie in a lie.

programme.title: South Park: A Ladder to Heaven
programme.desc: Kenny died with the winning ticket to a prize of endless candy in his pocket. The boys decide to build a ladder to Heaven where they expect to find him and get the ticket back. The Feds think Saddam may be hiding weapons in Heaven and plan to bomb it.

programme.title: South Park: Crippled Summer
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy head off to summer camp with all their handi-capable friends. When one of the camp counsellors, Towelie, falls off the wagon, the boys stage an intervention.

programme.title: South Park: White People Renovating Houses
programme.desc: Randy comes to grips with what it means to be white in today's society.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.title: South Park: W.T.F.
programme.desc: After attending their first WWE match, all the boys want to be professional wrestlers. When they decide the wrestling offered at school is lame, they create their own league, the WTF.

programme.desc: Leslie launches a competition with tech company Gryzzl for a large parcel of land, which she wants to turn into a National Park. April and Andy try to regain their spontaneity.

programme.title: The Office: Scott's Tots
programme.desc: Michael has to face the music when he realizes he cannot keep a promise he made to a group of kids 10 years earlier.

programme.desc: When a potential buyer comes to Dunder Mifflin, Michael, Dwight, Andy and Pam pull out all the stops in the hopes of impressing him with their high profile contacts. Michael reminisces about all the great times they have had in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Sabre
programme.desc: When Sabre comes in to take over Dunder Mifflin, Michael struggles to accept the new policies. Pam and Jim have an interview at the daycare they are hoping to get accepted into.

programme.title: The Office: The Manager and the Salesman

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam's contractions begin but she and Jim are determined to wait it out as long as possible so they can have more time at the hospital. The office tries to distract Pam from the pain by entertaining her.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam and Jim make a blunder after their baby's birth; Michael sets up Erin with Kevin.

programme.title: The Office: St. Patrick's Day
programme.desc: Michael thinks he has impressed Jo, only to learn that someone else in the office has caught her eye.

programme.title: The Office: New Leads
programme.desc: When the sales staff lets Sabre's new 'sales is king' policy get to their heads, Michael hides their new, prized leads.

programme.title: The Office: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Michael gets kicked out of a bar while trying to impress one of Jim's friends.

programme.title: The Office: Secretary's Day
programme.desc: Andy pulls out all the stops to give Erin a memorable Secretary's Day, and Michael reluctantly agrees to take her out to lunch. While out, Michael accidentally reveals a secret about Andy and Angela's relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Joneses
programme.desc: Jeff and Karen are surprised to find their new neighbours are much more sophisticated and talented than they are. Spying on them, they learn that the couple are covert operatives. Forced to go on the run, they attempt to help the Joneses on their mission.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Seventeen Ain't So Sweet
programme.desc: Jane's high school reunion is cut short when one of her old classmates turns up dead on the football field.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Don't Stop Dancing, Girl
programme.desc: The world of competitive dance turns deadly when the mother of a star performer is stabbed to death. Jane and the team search for clues, but soon learn that something is off in the woman's history.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Burning Down the House
programme.desc: When a warehouse fire kills a firefighter, Jane and Maura must investigate whether it was arson or an accident.

programme.desc: For the first time ever, Drew's ex-fiancé reveals a shocking revelation relating to his fourth wife, Stacy's, disappearance.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Jennifer Dulos Story
programme.desc: Delving deeper into shocking stories of criminal deception.

programme.title: Movie: Gone Mom: The Disappearance of Jennifer Dulos
programme.desc: Based on a true story. Details the story of Jennifer Dulos, the wealthy, Connecticut mother-of-five who mysteriously vanished on May 24, 2019.

programme.title: Movie: Believe Me: The Lisa McVey Story
programme.desc: The disturbing true-story of Lisa McVey, who was abducted in 1984 but later released by her abuser. At 17, a teen rides bike home after working contemplating her suicide, only to find herself wanting to stay alive when abducted.

programme.title: Movie: I Am Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: The story of Elizabeth Ann Smart, who as abducted from her home in 2002 and held captive for nine-months before being rescued.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.desc: Three women a day are killed by a former or current husband or boyfriend. Nicole Beverly is desperately trying to avoid that fate. Chris Cuomo goes inside the epidemic of intimate partner violence that turns lethal for so many women.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Doctor Love
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo unravels the twisted tale of what happened to a woman who thought she found the perfect man while online dating, until the promising love story went horribly wrong and somebody ended up dead.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jennifer Asbenson tells Chris Cuomo her terrifying encounter with serial killer Andrew Urdiales. Even though she spent years telling people her story, not even her own mother believed her until Urdiales confessed to several other crimes.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo conducts the last interview serial killer Andrew Urdiales will ever give.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Winter's Warning
programme.desc: Team Turin races to smash their 400-ounce season goal in Hummocks gold. But the increasing amounts of heavy black sand, early snow and pressure from the local community threaten to derail their operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Dave returns to the Doodlebug Cut in hopes of beating their 400-oz season goal. But when the channel they're mining is lost, Dave tracks down the son of an old-timer who gives him a lead that could send them over the top.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Million Dollar Gamble
programme.desc: With bonus features and added scenes: Dave pitches a return to Lynx Creek and Jason is hit with a bombshell that could end his Arizona adventure early.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Arizona Crush
programme.desc: In Arizona, Dave spots a clue that could be evidence of main channel gold before leaving for to an epic prospect in Alaska. But when Jason decides to move the crew off questionable pay, the pressure is on to hit their weekly target.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Claim Dating Game
programme.desc: Zeke hopes to find his perfect claim match. Shawn needs the Myrtle to save the Christine Rose. Emily is down to her last shot. Vernon's luck with divers gets worse. Kris is finally on a hot streak.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Suction
programme.desc: Emily learns first hand the dangers of dredging. Tempers flare and egos clash aboard the ship.

programme.desc: Captain Bou Basso and the SFTV crew head into backcountry to target tarpon, snook and bonefish.

programme.desc: Rain causes a series of spectacular race car crashes. An F4 Tornado destroys a town. A fiery crash leads to a freeway collapse. A jet crashes at an air show. A drag boat crashed and disintegrates at 200 miles per hour.

programme.title: Uncharted Waters with Peter Miller: Peter and Alessia in Guatamala
programme.desc: Peter is joined by girlfriend Alessia to target Big Mahi Mahi, Cubera snapper and sailfish at Pacific Fins, Guatemala.

programme.title: The RVers: 3.05
programme.desc: Topics include: national parks, RV water filtration and inverters.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Forward Thinking Back Part 1
programme.desc: Justin and Travis share what they've learned from their trips.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Crikey! It's A Baby
programme.desc: Bindi and Chandler prepare for the birth of their daughter, Grace Warrior Irwin-Powell. With their baby due any day, Bindi tackles her final tasks at the zoo, while Terri, Robert, and Chandler plan a shower and a nursery with some unexpected decorations.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Australia Zoo Begins Again
programme.desc: After weeks of being closed due to the global pandemic, the Irwins race to prepare for the re-opening of the zoo. Plus, Robert helps deliver a litter of newborn tiger cubs and Bindi handles a sudden crisis at the wildlife hospital.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Valley of the Banished
programme.desc: Survivalists enter a punishing African location where tribes in the area lived by a simple principle: banish the weak. As the 40-day challenge begins, deadly crocodiles and territorial leopards circle. A survivalist is quickly targeted for banishment.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Croc Shock
programme.desc: As temperatures soar, survivalists try to hunt while being hunted themselves. At Camp Murder Puddle, the group fights off a night attack by aggressive crocodiles. A team in turmoil leads to the first self-banishment of the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: The Barehanded Killer

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: No Calm After the Storm

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Boiling Point

programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.
