programme.title: Modern Family: White Christmas
programme.desc: In an effort to have the picture-perfect white Christmas she's always dreamed of, Gloria rents a cabin in the mountains for the whole family to celebrate the holiday. Meanwhile, the family is preoccupied with their own agendas.

programme.title: Modern Family: Playdates
programme.desc: Claire and Phil have dinner plans with this great couple they met on vacation; the only problem is they never pick up the bill, so Claire insists Phil be strong this time and make them pay.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spread Your Wings
programme.desc: Sick of having the ducklings around the house, Claire and the kids seize an opportunity to help expedite the ducks leaving the nest while Phil is off visiting Alex at college.

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean for a Day
programme.desc: Before Claire officially takes over Jay's closet business, she decides she must get the house in order and make the family clean out the clutter; unfortunately, Phil and Luke can't bear to part with anything.

programme.title: Modern Family: Thunk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Jay lets his jealousy get the best of him when a life-size cutout of Gloria for her grocery store hot sauce display solicits all kinds of unsavoury attention from men. He enlists Manny as his accomplice in a poorly orchestrated heist.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Storm
programme.desc: A huge thunderstorm brings wide power outages and the whole family congregates at Jay and Gloria's to use their generator. Jay has one foot out the door though, desperately trying to make it to a reunion with some old Navy buddies.

programme.title: Modern Family: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire has somehow turned into super mom, running Jay's closet business and yet still has time for all the duties at home. The kids could not be happier, but Phil could not be more frustrated.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Cover-Up
programme.desc: Phil has a new client who happens to be 'his type.' Knowing that might get him in trouble with Claire, he tells some seemingly innocent lies, which then lead to more, and soon enough he's in a full spiral.

programme.title: Modern Family: Express Yourself
programme.desc: Phil has the crazy idea of going on a trip to Paris with Claire, however, they are both so ridiculously tired but try to push through it. Meanwhile, Jay has taken over their bathroom remodel, which proves hazardous to the family.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Party
programme.desc: Manny and Luke are in charge of babysitting Lily so that the adults can enjoy a day to themselves. Claire and Gloria have a lovely trip to the spa planned, Phil and Mitch nerd out at the movies and Jay and Cam go to a sports bar to watch the big fight.

programme.title: Modern Family: Man Shouldn't Lie
programme.desc: Claire brings home a stray dog and gets the kids to help her hide it from Phil while she tries to find its owner. Unfortunately, her evasive behaviour only makes Phil try even harder to shower her with more attention.

programme.title: Modern Family: Promposal
programme.desc: With Closet-Con right around the corner, Claire is on high alert and convinced there is a mole in the company. Meanwhile, Phil goes vigilante when he and Gloria confront Auntie Alice for stealing her hot sauce recipe.

programme.title: Modern Family: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Dede is getting remarried, and Manny convinces the family to take the train up to her wedding.

programme.title: Modern Family: Double Click
programme.desc: Claire can't seem to find the right time to fire one of her employees, while back at home Phil thinks he caught Luke with a girl in his bed, and no one seems to notice that Alex has moved back home for the summer.

programme.title: Reunion Road Trip: With All of My Children
programme.desc: Some of the most beloved cast members of the iconic soap opera 'All My Children' reunite to celebrate its 50th anniversary and reminisce about the show’s origins, most outrageous storylines, and series cliff-hanger that left the fans wanting more.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love Lockdown
programme.desc: Khloe feels pressured to make a decision about her romantic future with Tristan. Scott heads to a treatment center to work on his health, but is betrayed when the facility leaks photos of him.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Beginnings and Endings
programme.desc: Khloe and Tristan run into some roadblocks in the process of expanding their family, Scott faces some big decisions about his relationship, and Kim prepares for a test that will determine her future as a lawyer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Family Rules
programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: New Friends and The Bunker
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are curious about Kourtney's new friend, Addison Rae. Scared by the state of the world, Kim takes measures to prepare for the future, while Kris is afraid to let her mom celebrate her birthday during a pandemic.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Great Ex-pectations
programme.desc: Kourtney sets boundaries with her Poosh team when the line between business and friendship becomes blurred. Caitlyn reaches out to Kris for some help with a business venture. Khloe and Tristan have an unexplainable experience while searching for aliens.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Summer of Love
programme.desc: Scott finally admits he's still in love with Kourtney. Khloè sets out in search of a homeless man who made a lasting impact on her years ago. Kim enlists the help of a professional to make her TikTok dancing debut.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End of an Era
programme.desc: The family makes a big decision about the future of the show and reflects on how Keeping Up will truly be an end of an era. Kris goes on a girls’ trip to decompress from the decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Season of Change
programme.desc: Khloè runs into some unexpected obstacles while exploring surrogacy. Scott worries that the family will drift apart now that the show is coming to an end. Kim is determined to figure out who is behind the satirical social media page NorisBlackBook.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up with the Kids
programme.desc: When Tristan realizes that Khloe is stressed about her living situation, he takes steps to make her feel more comfortable. Scott feels compelled to share some of his most sentimental moments from the show with his kids.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News
programme.desc: While planning an over-the-top birthday surprise for her mom, Kim receives some bad news about her legal studies that makes her question whether she is cut out to be a lawyer. Kourtney finds out that Kendall has been secretly returning all of her gifts.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End
programme.desc: The family departs on one last family trip to Lake Tahoe where they relive some of their fondest memories from the show. Kim deals with some turbulence in her marriage.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End
programme.desc: The family buries a time capsule to commemorate their years on Keeping Up. Kim updates the family on her future, Khloé must decide whether to move to Boston to be with Tristan, and Kourtney finally gives Scott some clarity about their romantic future.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Tale of Three Cities
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan reunites with all of the families converging at home for Father's Day.

programme.title: Modern Family: Blindsided
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Pritchetts are going head-to-head when Luke decides his best chance at getting into college is running for senior class president against Manny. Meanwhile, Cam finds his star football player is moving away and makes a rash decision.

programme.title: Modern Family: Weathering Heights
programme.desc: Phil can't cover up his excitement when he's invited to appear in a real-estate news segment for the local news. The day gets even better after meeting his 'weatherman' hero, Rainer Shine.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween 4: The Revenge of Rod Skyhook
programme.desc: Luke’s Halloween party isn’t the monster bash he dreamed of, and he is at risk of having the worst party of the year.

programme.title: Modern Family: Grab It
programme.desc: Jay's favourite place in the world, may be losing some of its charm when Phil considers becoming a member. At the Dunphy house, Claire mistakes her influence on Alex's life choices, and Hayley cares too much about what Alex thinks about hers.

programme.title: Modern Family: Thanksgiving Jamboree
programme.desc: It's going to be a Thanksgiving jamboree at the Pritchett-Tucker home this year, and Cameron has spared no expense.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Alliance
programme.desc: Hayley's plan for a fun-filled girl's day with Rainer Shine's teen daughter may be a little more angst-filled than expected. Meanwhile, Luke finds himself in a compromising position with a widow at the club.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dives Worth a Drive
programme.desc: Guy hunts down killer dives, including a nightclub in Cleveland that serves salmon BLTs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Worldwide Delivery
programme.desc: On the takeout menu today is Roman-style pizza from Arizona, a wicked-hot burger from Boston, Hawaiian surf and turf and Trinidadian specialities out of Seattle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecued, Baked and Brined
programme.desc: Guy visits three joints doing scratch cooking their way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Longmont, Colorado to check out what they're doing with cauliflower and pork burgers. In Columbus, Ohio, a Chicago-style restaurant makes Italian beef and gyros. Aarti Sequeira and Jet Tila meet Guy in Los Angeles for fiery Thai.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Latin Street Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taste buds are dancing as he digs into all kinds of Latin favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tasty Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into dishes steeped in tasty tradition. In Seattle, a funky spot makes their name with scratch-made Russian piroshki. A tucked-away joint in Kona serves up a bite of culture with their authentic Hawaiian cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Recipes
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's diving into dishes with righteous regional flavour. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mashup pilin' up smoked meat sensations, an inspiring Creole spot serving legit gumbo and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lights-Out Latin
programme.desc: This trip Guy's into all sorts of amazing Latin specialties from Peru to Panama to elsewhere.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Real Deal Delivery
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri are making recipes sent by DDD alums who join them via video chat. On this menu, there's real deal barbecue from Los Angeles, wild Thai dishes out of Phoenix and a monster lasagna from Minneapolis.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Sampler
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into all kinds of different meats on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a carnivore haven is stackin' sandwiches with dynamite duck and a pork trifecta. In Richmond, Va., a taco joint is loading up out-of-bounds oxtail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far East Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cruises the States to check out some Far-East flavours. In Seattle, a funky chicken spot puts an Asian spin on poultry. A family-run gem dishes out righteous Thai specialties on the big island of Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' International
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' gangster global grub. In Houston, a Jamaican joint knocking it out of the park with their oxtail and curry goat. Plus, a Lebanese stop serving up mom's specialties like kibbie balls and kabobs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Intercontinental Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy hits up world flavours tucked away in the U.S.A. In Los Angeles, a Korean-Mexican mashup serves up short rib tacos and spicy pork chimichangas. Also, a New Orleans-inspired joint cooks up Big Easy po' boys and crawfish mac and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh and Funky
programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri visits one of his favourite ocean-side spots serving up fresh Dungeness crab in San Francisco, CA. Also, in Charlotte, NC, where they boil turkeys and finally in Reno, NV where they make fresh granola.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Real Deal Delivery

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lights-Out Latin

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Goin' Big and Bringin' Home
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri combine cooking at home and great restaurant food with recipes sent by DDD alums who join in the fun via video chat. The menu includes a stromboli from Wyoming and seafood stew from a classic Georgia diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting spots keeping up with their family ties. In Pleasantville, N.J., a wife carries on her husband's legacy with his down-home chicken and waffles and righteous ribs. In Colorado Springs, family recipes are made at a BBQ joint.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Good Ingredients
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares recipes that use her favourite good ingredients starting with good chocolate in her chocolate pecan meringue torte. Next, good maple syrup and lemon are turned into sublime side dishes including maple-roasted acorn squash.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Herbs All Ways
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares her favourite herbs and tips for using them to amp up the flavour of dishes. Rosemary, oregano and mint highlight her Pork Souvlaki with Radish Tzatziki and Pitas for a delectable, easy meal.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Pour on Some Summer
programme.desc: Summer sauces are the star of the menu, starting with Katie Lee's sweet and spicy grilled chicken and cucumber salad and Geoffrey Zakarian's seared scallops with a caper honey sauce.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: All Greek to Me
programme.desc: It's a burger gift from the Greek gods. Michael Symon's Greek heritage is on full display as he makes a grilled Lamb Burger with Tzatziki. His wife, Liz, concocts an Ouzo Spritz with pickled watermelon rind that pairs perfectly with Michael's burger.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Meats and Sweets Feel the Heat
programme.desc: Only Michael Symon would think to make Moussaka on the grill, taking the Mediterranean casserole layered with meat, veggies and cheese sauce outside. His wife, Liz, joins him to create a light, complimentary side dish of grilled and steamed artichokes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: California Cooking
programme.desc: The sun is shining, and Ree Drummond is doing some California-style cooking. She makes wine-roasted chicken with pistachio pesto pasta, vibrant cauliflower tacos with avocado crema and divine roasted grape and ricotta toasts.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything Wildcard
programme.desc: Ree Drummond answers wildcard questions from friends, townsfolk and visitors to Pawhuska. She shares an over-the-top good seared rib eye Banh Mi Vietnamese sandwich and an awesome chicken quinoa bowl with roasted corn salsa.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: The Kitchen heads outdoors as the hosts get their grill ready for spring and put some grilling gadgets to the test in a Tool Takedown.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Brunch Spread
programme.desc: It's time for brunch in Michael Symon's backyard. He makes homemade bagels with poppy seeds and sesame seeds, and his wife, Liz, whips up homemade cream cheese to go with them. Michael also makes planked everything bagel-spiced salmon.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: A Bowl of Lemons
programme.desc: Guy Fieri gives his friends lemons, and they make anything but lemonade. Eric Greenspan stirs a citrusy Tom Collins, Antonia Lofaso lightens things up with puffy pavlova with lemon curd whipped cream, and Marc Murphy makes fried calamari with lemon aioli.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chop Chop
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag and Jet Tila are ready to compete, as they pit Italian chef Fabio Mura against Miami chef Nicole Votano. It's up to them to decide who has the chops to bring Bobby Flay down in his own kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Age Is Just a Number
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson is teaming up with Kimberly Schlapman to add one more award to her mantle: the Beat Bobby Flay Award!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Red Hot
programme.desc: A smokehouse master and a Californian take on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You Won't Like Him When He's Angry
programme.desc: Austrian chef Daniel Angerer is out to prove that his last win over Bobby Flay was no fluke, while Jersey restaurateur Jamie Knott hopes to become the new star of Bobby's nightmares.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Fiddle Around!
programme.desc: Fine-dining master chef Geoff Lazlo faces off against Cincinnati legend chef Daniel Wright, and both want to see Bobby Flay go up in smoke. Chef Josh Capon is joined by actress Teri Hatcher to make sure the chefs have the firepower to win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chop of the Mornin' to Ya
programme.desc: There's expertise in spades when Chopped regular Amanda Freitag and digital darling Laura Vitale arrive in Bobby Flay's arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Siblings Matt and Lisa Storch take their rivalry to the next level when they challenge each other for a chance to try and torch Bobby Flay. Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and Damaris Phillips are there to cheer them on to victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Blondes Have More Fun
programme.desc: Sara Haines tries to keep the winning streak alive when she teams up with Food Network's Anne Burrell to try to bring Bobby Flay down. Chefs Jonathan Dearden and Scott Drewno go head-to-head for a shot at Bobby's crown.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rental Reno

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: A Contemporary Cleanup
programme.desc: After his semi-hoarder house in a prime location sat on the market for months, it's getting handed over to the reluctant sisters. Lyndsay and Leslie transform problems into possibilities as they give this lackluster split level a contemporary facelift.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Keeping the Character
programme.desc: A young couple having trouble selling their older home ask Lyndsay and Leslie for help. The twins are challenged to keep the house's cozy character and add more charm to an aging property that's seen years of mish-mashed styles.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Nest Egg Reno
programme.desc: A daughter begs Leslie and Lyndsay to take over her mother's rambler after it sat on the market for three months. Using a few of their tricks, the twins change its dated and choppy layout by opening up the home and giving it a calming, coastal vibe.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Small House Save
programme.desc: A divorcee dials Leslie and Lyndsay to assist in selling his small home with some big obstacles. The sisters face the challenge by giving functionality to every space and mixing boho style with a bit of Southwest flair to pull in younger buyers.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Mid-Mod Oasis
programme.desc: A homeowner seeks Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell her inconsistently styled midcentury modern house. By decking out a dreamy backyard oasis and trimming trees to show off the water and mountain vista, the twins clear the way for a high sales price.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Two-Bedroom Dilemma
programme.desc: Siblings struggling to sell their sister's home need Lyndsay and Leslie's expertise. The twins redefine the dated two-bedroom rambler into a modern three-bedroom farmhouse with a deck that will be enjoyed even on a rainy Pacific Northwestern day.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Keep the Charm, Not the Layout

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Change the House, Not the School

programme.desc: Inexplicable phone calls torment the manager of a New Jersey cemetery, a foolhardy citizen taunts an insane serial killer in New Orleans and love and obsession drive a Florida scientist to desperate lengths.

programme.desc: Two aging ranch hands battle a flying maneater in the Arizona desert, a young Theodore Roosevelt trespasses into the lair of a half-human predator and demonic entities prey upon villagers in rural Pennsylvania.

programme.desc: A North Carolina storekeeper is haunted by a deadly prophecy, a smallpox victim fears he'll be buried alive after he's mistaken for dead in New Orleans and an Atlanta police station becomes a battleground between a killer and a vengeful spirit.

programme.title: True Terror with Robert Englund: Spirits in the Air
programme.desc: The horror escalates as a Massachusetts family hunts for a hidden fortune in a haunted house, a farmer battles a devilish curse in Ohio and a greedy mortician faces the wrath of the dead after he defiles their graves in a corrupt scheme.

programme.title: Movie: Bride Wars

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Lisa's Angels
programme.desc: Lisa and the SUR staff take part in the Gay Pride Parade. Things turn ugly when Stassi finds out that Jax is back to his womanizing ways. Kristen finds new evidence about Tom and Ariana's relationship and confronts them.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Kiss and Tell
programme.desc: Kristen tries to clear the air with Stassi, but reveals that Tom Schwartz may be cheating on Katie. Katie interrogates the SUR staff about Schwartz's infidelity and discovers they know more than expected. Lisa hosts the '50 Gay Mayors' event at PUMP.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: New Girl, Old Grudges
programme.desc: With Gay Pride coming up, Lisa hires a new hostess named Vail, who immediately catches the attention of Jax. Stassi slams Tom Schwartz for remaining friends with Jax, but Schwartz believes her anger is just a grudge against her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi passengers find themselves on a TV game show answering questions.

programme.title: Below Deck: My Dearest Emile ...
programme.desc: Connie and Rocky's whipped cream bikini party leaves a big mess on 'Eros.' Eddie’s long-distance relationship is on the rocks, and his problems are compounded when Dane and the other 'deckies' make a series of stupid mistakes.

programme.title: Below Deck: Storm's a Comin'
programme.desc: Emile is miffed when Rocky spells out the status of their relationship in a very public way. When the charter guests require an elaborate multi-course tasting menu, Leon's failure to order provisions in time puts the meal, and tips, in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Boom Boom in the Laundry Room
programme.desc: The 'Eros' crew enjoys a day off with an island hideaway, but Dane's drunken behaviour leads to a confrontation with Eddie that puts Dane's future on the boat in jeopardy. Meanwhile, the charter guests challenge Leon on his meal choices.

programme.title: Below Deck: Fire!
programme.desc: Leon commits a faux pas by ignoring a guest's meal request which brings back a traumatic childhood memory for her. When a fire breaks out in the galley, the whole boat is in danger. Plus, Connie's deckhand skills impress Eddie and Captain Lee.

programme.title: Below Deck: What Took You So Long?
programme.desc: Captain Lee grills the crew as he tries to find out the cause of the galley fire and the inquiry leads to a contentious dismissal. This leads Rocky to take a dramatic, unauthorized dive off the boat leaving her crew-mates shorthanded and angry.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: 'The Real Housewives of Atlanta's' Cynthia Bailey and Claudia Jordan, along with family and friends, board the 'Eros' to celebrate Cynthia's birthday, but bad weather keeps them stuck at the dock. The crew works extra hard to pamper their guests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: Frustrations mount for Rocky over her job and Eddie. Meanwhile, Ben wows charter guests with a steakhouse-style dinner, yet his breakfast dishes fail to measure up, and Rocky divulges details about a secret affair.

programme.title: Below Deck: Loose Lips Sink Ships
programme.desc: The final dinner of the charter season is imperiled when Ben suffers a severe injury and he’s forced to rely on Rocky for help. Captain Lee talks to Connie about her yachting future, and the crew's bonfire gets extremely tense.

programme.title: Below Deck: No One Said This Job Was Easy

programme.desc: The prosecution presents its star witnesses including intense interrogation tapes and complex cell phone data that give the trial an unexpected turn.

programme.title: The Simpsons: American History X-cellent

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens on Earth
programme.desc: When cameras appear to capture hard evidence of terrifying monsters and alien-like beasts, experts use the latest science and cutting-edge tech to investigate the truth behind these strange and sinister creatures.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Door to the Undead
programme.desc: Security guards patrolling the basement of an empty municipal building are shocked when they encounter a door repeatedly opening and violently slamming shut; experts investigate a connection to black magic rituals and the building's disturbing past.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Door to the Undead
programme.desc: Security guards patrolling the basement of an empty municipal building are shocked when they encounter a door repeatedly opening and violently slamming shut; experts investigate a connection to black magic rituals and the building's disturbing past.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens on Earth
programme.desc: When cameras appear to capture hard evidence of terrifying monsters and alien-like beasts, experts use the latest science and cutting-edge tech to investigate the truth behind these strange and sinister creatures.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Is the Universe a Hologram?
programme.desc: Shocking new evidence has convinced some of the world's greatest physicists that the universe is a hologram, and using cutting-edge technology, they investigate the secrets of black holes and space-time to build the case for this game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Asteroid Apocalypse
programme.desc: Investigating the apocalyptic consequences of an asteroid strike, and using cutting-edge science, experts are racing to develop tech that can destroy these deadly killers before they unleash Armageddon.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Rise of the Red Planet
programme.desc: The latest science reveals what it would take to build colonies on Mars, and how our future on the Red Planet might be closer than we think.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Finding Alien Moons
programme.desc: New discoveries are helping experts in their search for the first alien moon outside our solar system, which could be Earth-like worlds with the potential for life. So far, they haven't found any, but twenty-first century methods might change everything.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Seven Earths
programme.desc: The new discovery of seven alien Earth-like planets in a faraway solar system is a major milestone in our hunt for extraterrestrial life, and experts investigate the secrets of TRAPPIST-1's mysterious worlds to reveal if we're truly alone in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Gravitational Waves Revealed
programme.desc: Gravitational waves are helping scientists explore the cosmos in revolutionary, new ways, and the discoveries they make are revealing the universe's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: War of the Galaxies
programme.desc: Galaxies are locked in continual combat across the universe, and our own Milky Way will face its biggest opponent ever, the Andromeda Galaxy, in a titanic and deadly struggle that could create a new and unrecognizable super galaxy.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life
programme.desc: We're on the verge of uncovering the how life on Earth came to be. Our origin is a hotly contested scientific debate.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Curse of the White Dwarf
programme.desc: White dwarfs are small, dead stars with a dangerous side, capable of exploding into supernovas and destroying planets; new research suggests these mysterious phenomena may be the key to understanding the universe itself.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey to a Black Hole
programme.desc: Journey to the heart of the M87 supermassive black hole, the first and only black hole ever photographed, and explore the mystery of how it grew so large, what lies inside and how it controls the entire galaxy.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Next Supernova
programme.desc: Our galaxy is full of stars ready to explode into supernovas, a stellar detonation powerful enough to destroy all life on Earth; it's an event that hasn't occurred in 400 years, and the search is on to locate which star may be next.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Alien Worlds
programme.desc: An explosion in the discovery of exoplanets is challenging everything we know about our universe; experts use cutting-edge astronomy to investigate these mysterious alien worlds and how they defy the laws of physics.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Dungeon of Dread
programme.desc: When an off-duty police officer in San Francisco happens upon a minor theft at a lumberyard one Sunday afternoon, he unwittingly jumpstarts an investigation into one of California's deadliest, most depraved serial killers: Leonard Lake and Charles Ng.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Wrath of Love
programme.desc: Zach Sanders is being pulled in two directions between the woman he loves and his mistress who refuses to let him go. Jealousy, obsession and news of a surprise engagement leads to a deadly case of road rage.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Letter
programme.desc: A mysterious letter surfaces and contains a shocking twist in a homicide investigation. An entire family is impacted by the bombshell police uncover.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Loveless
programme.desc: There are many ways to leave your lover one of those ways is dead.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Beauty and the Beastly
programme.desc: Sometimes beauty can mask the ugliest of truths.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Family Tragedy
programme.desc: Home is where the heart is and a killer lurks.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Officer Down
programme.desc: The small town of Higginson, Arkansas, only has two full-time police officers. When one of them is brutally gunned down on duty, everyone in the community wants answers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love of Money
programme.desc: These Deadly Women sacrificed their loved ones to satisfy their 'Love of Money.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Jilted and Jealous
programme.desc: Jealousy can become an obsessive trait and a deadly trait.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Money Can't Buy You Love
programme.desc: When a local resident of Dunlap, Tennessee is picking up cans, he makes the shocking discovery of a murder victim's body floating in the river. Authorities must discover first who the deceased is and then who could have committed the horrendous crime.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women take the wedding vow 'till death do us part' seriously; they make sure their marriages are "Fatal Ties."

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder, Modesty, and the Pastor
programme.desc: Corinne isn't a demanding woman - she just wants what many lonely people want: a second chance at love. And when she meets Calvin Stoudt she finally gets it. But a too-close roommate and a monstrous past turn this second chance into a deadly battleground.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Country Killer
programme.desc: Rodeo start Matt Allen finds southern comfort in the arms of country girl Elsie Wells. Until she finds his best friend-and they all discover a thick gumbo of trouble.

programme.title: Who Killed the Lyon Sisters?
programme.desc: Featuring bestselling author Mark Bowden, secret police recordings and first-person accounts, this doc explores the haunting 1975 disappearance of 2 sisters from a Maryland mall and the predatory backwoods clan that may have hidden the crime for 40 years.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Married to the Devil
programme.desc: Christine's life with abusive husband Shane is a constant cycle of fear, humiliation and violence. When she finally escapes with her kids, Shane sets off in pursuit, kicking off a series of terrifying and shocking events leading to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: Redrum: Triangle of Death
programme.desc: When a recently divorced factory worker was found stabbed to death in his home after a violent struggle, the investigators discovered a lovesick motive.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Guess I've Got No Conscience
programme.desc: A woman's body is found strangled and partially nude off the side of a Connecticut country road. Investigators apprehend a suspect in her murder, only to discover he's a prolific serial killer - responsible for the rape and the murder of eight women.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: New Beginnings, Violent Endings
programme.desc: When Dorian Bluford moves to a new city to be closer to a friend his family doesn't know, he's brutally murdered stabbed 37 times in the chest.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Never Let Her Go
programme.desc: A young woman far away from home finds herself increasingly isolated from her friends and family by the man she loves. As his efforts to control her intensify, she comes to realize that he will stop at nothing to keep her by his side.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Bible Belt Massacre
programme.desc: Two days before the new millennium, the Freeman family trailer is burned to the ground. The couple's remains are found with bullets to the head, but their teenage daughter and her friend are missing.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood Ties
programme.desc: A college student working as a radio station intern far from home is murdered, launching a long and frustrating investigation that leaves family and police on the brink of hopelessness until forensic genealogy leads to a man on the run for decades.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Suburban Secrets
programme.desc: When doting mother, Cheryl Coker, vanishes from Riverside, Ohio on October 2nd 2018 numerous search efforts come up empty. But as police take a closer look at the case, they uncover some disturbing information.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mistress of Death
programme.desc: Two women living next to each other since childhood descend into bitter conflict when the ex husband of one starts seeing the other. Add property issues to this toxic mix and the result is an act of shocking violence that engulfs all.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Mother of It All
programme.desc: A lively slumber party turns into a nightmare when a loving mother, Dianne Watts, her young daughter, and her daughter's friend, are murdered. The town of McMinnville is turned upside down, knowing there is a killer amongst them.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Part of the Texas Seven
programme.desc: Patrick Murphy and six other inmates pull off the largest escape in Texas history. They launch a statewide crime spree but up the ante when they kill a police officer. They hide in an RV Park but get recognized, prompting a showdown with authorities.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make It in the Big Easy
programme.desc: Jeremy Woods convinced his girlfriend to forge bad checks and then murdered her and her son.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make You a Superstar
programme.desc: A scam artist conned aspiring artists out of millions. A modern day Bonnie and Clyde eluded police until a slip-up led to their doorstep.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through a Toilet
programme.desc: Lifelong pals and criminals Timothy Fletcher and Doni Brown break out of a Florida prison in 2009. Anxious for freedom, the two need money. A robbery that ends in murder puts them on most wanted lists and leads cops on a manhunt across the Southeast.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be Part of the Pittsburgh Six
programme.desc: Andrew Heim is doing time for assault at Western Penitentiary in Pennsylvania. When a prison buddy finds a way to tunnel out of the prison Heim and five other inmates escape. The group is dubbed 'The Pittsburgh Six' and sparks a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A College Chaplain Seeks Home to Keep the Peace
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take Denitia and Norris Blount on a tour through three houses near Baylor University. The Blounts are almost empty-nesters with two kids at home and two on their own.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Derby Dolls
programme.desc: Four bakers try to elbow past the competition for a chance to bring their cupcakes to a party celebrating the Los Angeles Derby Dolls.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes for the Queen
programme.desc: It will be a British Invasion of the sweet kind when four English bakers fight for the chance to have their cupcakes featured at an exclusive party celebrating Queen Elizabeth's Diamond Jubilee.

programme.title: Buddy's Bakery Rescue: Prince Street Cafe and Bakery
programme.desc: Dana opens a bakery as a tribute to her grandfather's bakery in Boston, where she spent many of her young days. Buddy finds some inconsistencies in the tribute bakery.

programme.title: Buddy's Bakery Rescue: Pastry Is Art
programme.desc: Jenny came to the U.S from Peru, working as a chef before opening her own business. Life in her bakery is more like a soap opera, and Buddy is here to help them kick-start the business.

programme.title: Buddy's Bakery Rescue: Grandma Millie's Bakery and Cafe
programme.desc: Chauncey and her family can't get their bakery off the ground. Her son wants to creat more modern desserts but Chauncey doesn't want to change the menu.

programme.title: Buddy's Bakery Rescue: Bing's Bakery
programme.desc: Bing's Bakery has been open since 1946. Owner, Tom, keeps hundreds of items on the menu, both good and bad. Buddy must help Tom make the changes he needs to improve his business.

programme.title: Buddy's Bakery Rescue: Not Jus' Donuts
programme.desc: Tensions are high in Houston. Myrtle passes the bakery torch on to her daughters, but teamwork is falling short. To make things worse, the A/C unit dies leaving decorating in limbo.

programme.desc: Barbecue is in the blood at two family-run institutions where the dedication for perfecting smoked meats spans decades.

programme.title: Good Eats: Immersion Therapy

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Walkies On The Wildside / May Contain Nuts
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Winter Funderland / Snow Day
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Locked On! Lightning Launch!
programme.desc: Rantaro Kiyama has been asked to step in to coach them and the Comets. With the help of his little brother, Ranjiro, Honcho teaches Hyuga and Hikaru what Beyblade is all about. It's brothers versus brothers for the ultimate test!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'A Doggone Shame ' and 'Rotten Renting Practices.'

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did My Ex Do the Unthinkable?
programme.desc: Cassie suspects that her ex Shaquille set their house ablaze. He says he started the fire, but swears it was an accident. Then, James accuses his ex-wife Mandi of using drugs during her pregnancy, leading to the death of their unborn child.

programme.title: Maury: I'm 55 ... You're 22 ... I Can't Be Your Baby's Father!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Delicious Revenge
programme.desc: Markus did the unthinkable when he hooked up with his best friend Kenny’s husband Tevin.

programme.title: Maury: My Husband Has Five Kids With Five Women ... But Does He Cheat?
programme.desc: Javonna married a man 19 years older than her, because she wanted a mature man who was done with games, but now she suspects he's cheating again. Becky and Johnny are back; Becky got an STD while pregnant so thinks Johnny is cheating.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Yard Sale
programme.desc: With the house feeling too cramped and crowded, Molly plans a family yard sale. Meanwhile, Mike and the guys take Carl on a fishing trip to help him forget his breakup with Christina.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Strike Out
programme.desc: While the IPS strike continues, Carrie and Kelly worry about their husbands' sanity.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Wedding Cake Cake Cake
programme.desc: Max and Caroline agree to make a wedding cake for a bride who can't decide on what style she wants or much of anything else.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Raven-Symoné, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Jodi Miller, and Maz Jobrani.

programme.title: Black-ish: Nothing But Nepotism
programme.desc: Bow urges Dre to use his connections and secure Zoey a fellowship, but he doesn't want his daughter relying on nepotism. When Bow finds Zoey a place at the hospital, Dre balks at the idea and successfully pulls some strings at Teen Vogue.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pops' Pops' Pops
programme.desc: Jack and Diane look for clues about their roots for their class assignment, a history of the Johnson family. When they can't find anything out about the family's past, Pops comes to the rescue with the colourful story.

programme.title: Walker: Defend the Ranch
programme.desc: Walker's past comes back with a vengeance and threatens his family.

programme.title: Legacies: This Feels a Little Cult-y
programme.desc: In an attempt to control some of Hope's negative emotions, Josie suggests they join Lizzie at a wellness retreat for witches. Alaric and Dorian team up after learning MG may be in trouble.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Opposite
programme.desc: George decides to live his life by doing the opposite of what his instincts tell him.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Label Maker
programme.desc: Jerry gets re-gifted when he gives some Superbowl tickets to a friend and receives Elaine's label-maker in exchange. Kramer takes a game of Risk against Newman seriously. George convinces his girlfriend to get rid of her male roommate.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Don't Worry, Speed Racer
programme.desc: When Jake tells Charlie and Alan that he often overhears his mother and Herb having sex, it triggers a repressed memory for Charlie. Rose tries to help Charlie work through the problem.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Four Balls, Two Bats and One Mitt
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey decide to spice things up in the bedroom.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Weird Science
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray move Erica into college where her roommate is also named Erica. Later, Beverly has a hard time letting go and ends up sleeping over in the dorm, much to Erica's dismay.

programme.title: Mom: Wind Chimes and a Bottomless Pit of Sadness
programme.desc: Christy, Bonnie, Jill and Wendy get high after accidentally eating cookies filled with pot.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Marriage Doctor
programme.desc: When Mike finds out his future son-in-law Kyle fears meeting with the church's new minister, Mike tells Kyle to use him and Vanessa as a strong marriage example. But a recent argument ends up sending them to the minister instead.

programme.title: Mom: Mashed Potatoes and a Little Nitrous
programme.desc: Bonnie goes to extremes to keep a major secret from Christy.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Out of Breath/ Subspecies
programme.desc: Ex-girlfriend sues for intentional harm; former librarian sues for wrongful termination.

programme.desc: Man sues former friend for medical expenses; mother sues over damaged costume.

programme.title: Protection Court: Attacked by My Ex and His New Boyfriend/ Daughter Broke Down Door
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Not So Idle Threats/ Little Black Book Full of Dirty
programme.desc: Harassment; books taken for a book drive contain surprises.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Reaves vs. Silva
programme.desc: A Florida man says it's ok for men to cheat on their wives and now he's in court claiming his girlfriend cheated and another man is her son's father.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Richardson vs. Robbins
programme.desc: A Minnesota man claims his ex-girlfriend is still married and believes her husband is the father of her two-month-old son.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Anthony says Andrea, his ex/mother of his children, owes him for a loan, and a mattress topper and two picnic tables he purchased. Andrea says it was a gift and she owes nothing.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A mother is suing her daughter for unpaid loans and claims that although she worked hard to be a good role model, her daughter became addicted to drugs and ended up in prison.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Loafing Around ' and 'Making a Mess of Things.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Taking Advantage of an Ex ' and 'Trimming a Guy Where it Hurts.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Panic Prank/ Lemme Brake It To Ya
programme.desc: A fraternity prank leads to a medical emergency; a dispute between roommates over a damaged car.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: William is suing Billie and Albert for property damage and wants to be compensated for the money he spent to fix the property. Billie and Albert claim they took care of his property better than William and don’t owe him anything.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Have Sex With Her in Front of Our Kids
programme.desc: Nichole has been receiving messages from a woman on social media claiming she had sex with her husband. Then, Lionel accuses Keyonna of cheating. Steve's lie detector tests will help these couples find out the truth.

programme.title: Maury: My Phone Recorded You Cheating ... The Test Will Prove It!
programme.desc: Minnie is here with her long time boyfriend to see if he has been cheating on her. Then Ashley and her much older fiancé are here to get to the bottom of his mysterious disappearance that ended when he was found at his ex-girlfriend's house.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Flirty Face-Offs
programme.desc: Paige believes it’s important for people to know your relationship status when it comes to social media. But the man she wants to be with, Chris, isn’t looking for commitment and just wants to keep her around to hook up with from time to time.

programme.title: Maury: Did My Cheating Wife Have a Baby With Another Man?
programme.desc: Denise broke up with Jeremiah while pregnant and moved away. Jeremiah took this as a sign he is not the father. Aaron wants DNA on both Brittani’s kids, because he thinks she's a cheater. Charlene wants to prove to her man Red that he's her baby's father.

programme.title: Dynasty: A Little Father-Daughter Chat
programme.desc: Fallon sets out to make sure everyone knows who's the boss. Adam heads to the hospital to undo damage done by Fallon. Sam complains to Culhane about his relationship. Cristal and Blake make headway towards reconciling.
